PEP.claim: PepsiCoは42年連続配当増加を達成しており、Pepsi・Lay's・Doritos・Quakerなどアイコニックブランドポートフォリオへの継続的A&M投資（総収益の一定割合）が長期的ブランドエクイティを維持している。2014年にはA&M投資がハイシングルディジット増加。
PEP.evidence: We increased our annual dividend for the 42nd consecutive year; In 2014, we sustained our increased A&M investment and focused our spending on our biggest brands; Our investments are translating to tangible results, with solid improvement in brand equity scores and market share performance in our priority markets for our global brands

PEP.claim: PepsiCoは米国の食品・飲料メーカーの中で最大の小売売上成長貢献者であり、上位27社の合計貢献額を上回る約$10億の小売売上成長を単独で創出した（IRI調査、全チャンネル）。
PEP.evidence: we were the largest contributor to U.S. retail sales growth among all food and beverage manufacturers. Based on IRI data, in all measured channels, we contributed nearly $1 billion of retail sales growth, more than the combined sales growth of the next 27 largest manufacturers

PEP.claim: PepsiCoのグローバルスナック規模（Frito-Lay）と飲料（PepsiCo Beverages）の組み合わせにより、米国外での新製品（Doritos JACKED等）のリフト&シフト展開が可能であり、1回の開発投資で複数市場に展開できる収益化効率を有する。
PEP.evidence: we leveraged our global scale by lifting and shifting successful new products like Doritos JACKED and Deep Ridged Chips from the United States into a number of international markets; We secured attractive new businesses such as the Disney Park in Shanghai, leveraging the strength of our combined beverage and snack portfolio

PEP.claim: PepsiCoは3年間$30億の生産性プログラムを完遂後、新たに5年間$50億の生産性プログラムを開始。自動化・製造拠点最適化・GTMモデル改善・シェアードサービスにより年間約$10億の節約を2019年まで継続する計画。フリーキャッシュフロー/コア純利益は3年連続100%超。
PEP.evidence: We successfully completed our 3-year, $3 billion productivity program launched in 2012, and we're entering our next phase of productivity with the new 5-year, $5 billion program; Our free cash flow as a percent of our core net income exceeded 100% for the year and over the past 3 years

PEP.claim: PepsiCoのイノベーションパイプラインは過去最強の状態であり、イノベーション売上比率は2年間で150bp上昇し現在9%。Tostitos Cantina、Mountain Dew Kickstart、Pure Leafなどの最近の新製品は発売年に$1億超を達成後も二桁成長を維持。
PEP.evidence: innovation as a percentage of total net revenue has climbed by 150 basis points and now stands at 9%; a number of our recent product introductions like Tostitos Cantina, Mountain Dew Kickstart and Pure Leaf generated double-digit estimated annual retail sales growth in 2014 after achieving over $100 million in their launch year

PEP.claim: PepsiCoの地域多様性（Americas/Europe/AMEA）は政治・経済・通貨のリスクを分散し、$100投資が1965年から$42,000超（配当再投資）に成長した50年の実績がある。新興国は有機収益10%成長を継続しポートフォリオ全体を支援している。
PEP.evidence: a $100 investment in PepsiCo in 1965 with dividends reinvested would be worth over $42,000 today; even our developing and emerging markets grew organic revenue 10% in the quarter and 9% for the full year

PEP.claim: PepsiCoは長期目標として年間ミッドシングル有機収益成長、30-50bp営業利益率改善、ハイシングルCC EPS成長、ROIC年50bp改善を設定。10年配当CAGR 10%を達成しており、これらは規模の経済と生産性プログラムの複合効果によるもの。
PEP.evidence: Our long-term goals remain intact: mid-single-digit organic revenue growth, core operating margins expanding 30 to 50 basis points per year, high single-digit core constant-currency EPS growth; we'll bring our 10-year annualized dividend-per-share compound annual growth rate to 10%

PFE.claim: Pfizer は2011年以来16の承認（うち10が新分子実体）を取得し、後期開発・承認申請段階に29プログラムを含む86の臨床開発プログラムを保有している。特にIbrance（palbociclib）はCDK 4/6阻害剤プラットフォームとして複数のがん適応症展開が可能な成長プラットフォームを形成している。
PFE.evidence: Since undertaking this effort, we have received 16 approvals as of the end of last year, 10 of which were new molecular entities; Today, we have a total of 86 programs in clinical development with 29 programs in late-stage development or registration; CDK 4/6 platform in oncology with Ibrance or generic name palbociclib and its potential for indications being studied in the broad spectrum of breast cancer, as well as lung, prostate, head and neck, melanoma

PFE.claim: PfizerはMerck KGaAとの免疫腫瘍（IO）提携を通じてavelumab（抗PD-L1）を含む総合的なIOプラットフォームを構築。2015年に最大20試験を共同実施し、単剤・組み合わせ療法で複数のがん種への最初の3社以内の参入を目指す。
PFE.evidence: Through our partnership with Merck KGaA and their anti-PD-L1, avelumab, we are able to accelerate our participation in immuno-oncology space; we are positioned to be a potential leader in the next wave of IO combination therapies; This year, we will be collaborating on up to 20 studies with Merck KGaA with registrational intent on up to 6 of these studies

PFE.claim: Pfizer は4年間で営業費から約$55億を削減し、LipitorのLOEや複数高利益率製品の特許切れにもかかわらず営業利益率を維持。株主還元は4年間で$640億（配当+自社株買い）を超え、2015年には更に$130億を見込む。
PFE.evidence: Over the last 4 years, we have maintained our operating margins and have taken approximately $5.5 billion out of our operating expenses; we have returned just over $64 billion to shareholders through share repurchases and dividends over the last 4 years; in 2015, we anticipate returning approximately $13 billion to shareholders through dividends and share repurchases

PFE.claim: PfizerのEliquis（経口抗凝固薬）は循環器専門医の新処方シェアで首位を目指す位置にあり、Xeljanz（JAK阻害剤）はリウマチ専門医の新処方シェアで3位、Prevnar 13成人用ワクチンはCDC接種推奨後に普及が加速している。
PFE.evidence: Eliquis is winning share amongst cardiologists and moving towards the leading position in the new-to-brand share in several markets, including the U.S. and Japan; We grew our Xeljanz market share so that it is now ranked #3 in new-to-brand prescription share with rheumatologists; we are seeing good uptake with our Prevnar 13 adult vaccines following the CDC's Advisory Committee on Immunization Practices recommendation

PFE.claim: Pfizerはバイオシミラーポートフォリオ（Herceptin、Rituxan、Remicade、Avastin、Humiraのバイオシミラー）を構築し、コンプレックス・モノクローナル抗体分野での世界的なバイオシミラーリーダーを目指している。従来の製薬会社がオリジネーター保護に固執する中、Pfizerは両刀戦略を採る。
PFE.evidence: We have a broad biosimilars portfolio of complex monoclonals. Of the current pipeline of 5 assets, 3 are ongoing for enrolling Phase III trials; We believe we can become one of the world's preeminent biosimilar companies

PFE.claim: Pfizerは次の4年間（2015-2018年）で20以上のPhase II-III開始と15以上の潜在的承認を見込み、Ibranceを含む新製品群が2015年に$20億の追加的収益成長をもたらす。新分子実体パイプラインが2017-18年以降の成長を支える。
PFE.evidence: over the course of the next 4 years, we expect to have more than 20 Phase II and III registration starts and hope to have more than 15 potential approvals; We expect these products...will generate nearly $2 billion in incremental operational revenue growth this year compared to last

PFE.claim: Pfizerの新興市場（中国・ブラジル・インド・ロシア・トルコ等）はEstablished Pharmaセグメントで2015年にミッドからハイシングルディジットの収益成長を見込み、特許切れ製品の高品質・低コスト供給という明確な戦略が確立されている。
PFE.evidence: We expect to see operational revenue growth of mid- to high single digits in Emerging Markets this year by focusing on opportunities in key growth markets such as China, Brazil, India, Russia and Turkey; 7% operational growth in Emerging Markets driven by Lipitor, mainly in China, as well as Prevnar and Enbrel

PG.claim: P&G はカテゴリバリュー（利益・キャッシュ）の不均衡な獲得を実現している。例として、米国洗剤市場では売上シェア約 60% に対し利益シェア約 85% を獲得。シェービング市場ではプレミアムセグメントの 88% のシェアと全体カテゴリ利益の約 90% を獲得している。
PG.evidence: we have about a 60% share of U.S. laundry market sales, but earn approximately 85% of the profit and cash generated in the entire category; nearly a 70% share of the Grooming business worldwide and about a 90% share of value or profit.

PG.claim: P&G の生産性改善プログラムは FY2014 に 16 億ドルのコスト削減を達成し、目標（12 億ドル/年）を 33% 上回った。製造生産性（製品ケース数/人/年）は目標を大幅に上回り、非製造部門の人員削減も当初目標（2016 年 6 月までに 10% 削減）を 2 年前倒しで 16% 削減した。
PG.evidence: We delivered $1.6 billion of cost of good savings, well ahead of our target run rate of $1.2 billion and ahead of our going-in estimate of $1.4 billion. We improved manufacturing productivity by over 7%... we've reduced roles by 16%, more than 50% ahead of the original objective 2 years earlier.

PG.claim: Gillette Fusion ProGlide（プレミアムセグメント）は市場投入から 31 四半期連続でグローバル価値シェアを拡大し、P&G ブランド史上最速で 10 億ドル規模に到達した。後継製品 FlexBall（2014 年 7 月）投入後、米国男性カミソリカテゴリの価値が 30% 急上昇した。
PG.evidence: Fusion grew global value share for 31 consecutive quarters, reaching $1 billion in sales faster than any other P&G brand or any other Gillette shaving system in history... we've seen a 30% spike in male razor category value in the U.S.

PG.claim: P&G は 70〜80 ブランドへのポートフォリオ集中戦略（160 ブランドから半減）を実行し、集中するブランド群は総売上の 90%・総利益の 95% 超を占める。非集中ブランドは過去 3 年で売上 -3%/年・利益 -16%/年と衰退しており、戦略的撤退で集中効果が高まる Counter-Positioning 型の意思決定である。
PG.evidence: over the last 3 years, this 70- to 80-brand portfolio has accounted for 90% of company sales and over 95% of the profit... the balance 90 to 100 brands... sales of these brands has been declining 3% per year. Over the past 3 years, profits have been declining 16%.

PG.claim: P&G の北米サプライチェーン再設計（多カテゴリ製造拠点への集約、配送センター統合）により、全製品の 80% を店舗棚まで 1 日以内で届けられる配送ネットワークを構築した。このシステムは競合が個別に模倣困難な規模依存型のインフラ優位である。
PG.evidence: We're taking this opportunity to simplify, standardize and upgrade manufacturing platforms... enabling 80% of P&G's business to be within 1 day or less of the store shelf and the shopper.

PG.claim: P&G の Swaddlers（Pampers サブブランド）は独自のデザインで消費者プレファレンスを獲得し、米国オムツ市場のシェアリーダーシップを 20 年ぶりに奪回した（競合比 6 ポイント差）。リピート購買率 60〜70% の Always Infinity も同様の消費者スティッキネスを示す。
PG.evidence: we've opened up a spread of almost 6 points -- 6 share points on diapers... Women who have tried it and purchased it are repurchasing it at a rate of 60% to 70%.

PG.claim: Tide PODS と Gain Flings（ユニットドーズ洗剤）は合計で米国洗剤カテゴリの価値シェア 10% 超、ユニットドーズセグメントの 80% 超を占める。Tide PODS は Tide 液体比 20% 値上げ、Gain Flings は Gain 液体比 60% 値上げでも高い市場採用を得た。
PG.evidence: Tide PODS are priced at a 20% premium to base Liquid Tide... Combined, Tide PODS and Gain Flings now hold a more than 10% value share of the U.S. laundry category and over 80% of the unit dose segment.

PG.claim: P&G は FY2015 において非製造部門の人員を累積 22% 削減（当初目標 10% の 2 倍以上）し、FY2017 末までに 25〜30% 削減を目標とする。同時に製造生産性は過去 3 年間で 15% 向上（同一サイト比 -20%）した。コスト削減額は FY2015 で 15 億ドルに達する。
PG.evidence: we've reduced nonmanufacturing overhead roles by 22%, more than double the original target... We generated $1.5 billion of cost of goods savings in fiscal 2015, contributing 200 basis points of gross margin improvement. We improved manufacturing productivity by 5%, bringing cumulative past 3-year manufacturing enrollment reductions to 15%.

PG.claim: P&G の広告エージェンシーコストは FY2015 に前年比 -15% 削減。ブラジルでは 50% 削減、米国ヘアケアでは代理店数 1/3 削減・支出 20% 削減、デジタルマーケティングでは 75% 以上削減を達成。代理店数は約 40% 削減し、プロダクション支出は年間約 3 億ドル削減した。
PG.evidence: Our overall agency costs in fiscal 2015 were down about 15% versus the prior year... we consolidated to a single global agency for digital marketing, reducing spending for these services by more than 75%... we reduced the number of agencies by nearly 40% and cut agency and production spending by about $300 million versus the prior year.

PG.claim: P&G は Crest 3D White で 17 四半期連続市場シェア拡大を達成し、10 億ドルビジネスに成長。ウエスタンヨーロッパのオーラルケアカテゴリを +3.5% 成長（他カテゴリが -1〜2%）させるカテゴリエクスパンダーとして機能した。ブラジルで +1.5 シェアポイント、メキシコで +1 ポイントを追加。
PG.evidence: Crest 3D White premium Oral Care regimen was also launched in the U.S. and grew market share for 17 consecutive quarters, expanded worldwide, and has become a $1 billion business... In Western Europe, the Oral Care category grew 3.5% in value this last quarter in a region where many other categories are declining 1% to 2%.

PG.claim: P&G は FX 中立ベースで EPS が double-digit 成長（FY2014: constant currency +10-25%）を継続しており、生産性改善による利益率改善が EPS 成長の主要ドライバーとなっている。フリーキャッシュフロー生産性は 86%（FY2014）・102%（FY2015）と高水準を維持し、過去 5 年間で 600 億ドル（年平均 120 億ドル）を株主還元した。
PG.evidence: On a constant currency basis, core earnings per share grew double digits... We generated $11.6 billion in adjusted free cash flow, with a 102% adjusted free cash flow productivity... Over the past 5 years, we've returned $60 billion to shareholders, $12 billion a year on average

PG.claim: P&G の 59 年連続増配（FY2015 現在）は財務的規律と長期的株主価値重視の具体的証左であり、競合 FMCG との差別化要因となっている。
PG.evidence: We increased the dividend for the 59th consecutive year... In fiscal 2015... returning $11.9 billion in cash to shareholders: $7.3 billion in dividends and $4.6 billion in share repurchase

PGR.claim: Progressive の Snapshot テレマティクスプログラムは業界初（15 年の先行）の使用量・挙動連動型自動車保険であり、2014 年 1 月時点で約 20 億ドルの保険料（Snapshot 加入ポリシー）を達成し、継続的な高成長を記録している。GPS データ・外部データセットとの統合により次世代製品開発が進行中。
PGR.evidence: I'm quite happy with $2 billion on the books for '13... what I pushed out of my prior comments was just a feel that is far greater than it just heartbreaks out accelerations factors we use today... Progressive's strength is always been about what you do with the information as opposed to whether we're the only ones to have it.

PGR.claim: Progressive は「コスト基準価格設定（96% combined ratio 目標）」を基本原則として採用しており、競合の価格動向ではなく自社のリスクデータに基づき保険料を決定する。この規律が長期的な引受利益の安定化をもたらす。
PGR.evidence: our modus operandi of the company is really to price as close as possible to a 96%... we must live with our own cost-based pricing. We don't price it necessarily based on what our competitors doing or not doing.

PGR.claim: Progressive は 30 年以上前に設計された基幹システムをリアルタイム処理型にフルスクラッチで再構築し、2014 年に 80% 完了。新システムはモバイル・インターネット完全対応、5 台超の自動車・5 名超ドライバーのポリシー制限を排除し、消費者直接操作を前提に設計されている。
PGR.evidence: we really wanted to take a look at what the future of Progressive would look like, from both a capacity perspective, real-time processing... we are -- we like so many companies, had pretty good systems, but they were designed in an era where effectively batch processing was the design criteria... we're really happy with the outcome.

PGR.claim: Progressive の Progressive Home Advantage（自動車＋住宅マルチライン）プログラムは、複数商品保有者のポリシー生存期間（PLE）を大幅に向上させる。マルチライン保有者は単一商品保有者に比べ「解約可能性が劇的に低下する」と CFO が明言。
PGR.evidence: our Progressive Home Advantage program... we certainly are continuing to make inroads in that and that's continuing to grow nicely. And we know if we can get more of our policyholders to have more than 1 product with us... our propensity to have them stay with us longer increases dramatically.

PGR.claim: Progressive はクレジットスコア、テレマティクスデータ、外部データセット（GPS データと事故頻度マップ等）を組み合わせた多次元リスクセグメンテーションを継続的に深化させており、他社が同じデータを持ったとしても Progressive のデータ活用モデルとアナリスト人材が本質的優位を形成すると CEO が明言した。
PGR.evidence: Progressive's strength historically has been using data and segmenting that data to its advantage. So we had no proprietary rights to something like credit, but it can use credit. We like to think we used it very well... the winners and losers in this one will be the companies that have adapted to the technology and have the talent to be able to use that kind of data.

PGR.claim: Progressive は直接チャネル（Flo キャラクター等）における高知名度とブランド力を持ち、広告費単位当たりの新規契約獲得率が他の比較見積もりサイト依存型競合より高い。直接チャネルでの Snapshot 普及率が代理店チャネルを大幅に上回る。
PGR.evidence: I just give you a little bit of the data set that I try to work from... some companies that do not necessarily, in my opinion, do not necessarily have quite the same brand strength to be able to promote themselves in the way that we do.

PGR.claim: Progressive は Snapshot の Massachusetts 展開で「期待割引の一部を事前に提供」する新しい代理店向けセールスモデルを試験し、代理店チャネルでの Snapshot 普及率を直接チャネル並みに引き上げることに成功しつつある。この設計変更は代理店への Snapshot 販売インセンティブ問題を解決する。
PGR.evidence: We gave some portion of that expected value of the discount as an upfront discount... we actually tried that as a way to see if ultimately, the same end result might occur... in fact, closed. And while we have early reads, and I reported on that in my letter, that's something we're very intrigued.

PGR.claim: Snapshot 割引加入者は非加入者比較でポリシー生存期間（PLE）が有意に長い。テレマティクス割引受取ユーザーは他社への乗り換えコスト（割引喪失リスク）が増大するため、Progressive との継続インセンティブが高まる。
PGR.evidence: we also know our Snapshot program, where those who received discounts via Snapshot programs. PLEs of those are better so we have other initiatives other than just individual rate level changes that are showing to show increases in our PLEs.

PGR.claim: Progressive はコスト基準価格設定を徹底しており、競合（State Farm、GEICO、Travelers）の価格動向を「インプット情報」として使うが、価格決定の根拠にはしない。このモデルは市場シェア志向型の競合が模倣すると自社の引受原則を毀損するため、真の Counter-Positioning として機能する。
PGR.evidence: We clearly are responsive to what competitors are doing in other areas and making sure that our story is well told to agents... But our expectation is that the companies will always be refining their product as we are all the time... we must live with our own cost-based pricing.

PGR.claim: Progressive の戦略は「96% Combined Ratio を維持しながら可能な限り高い成長」を基本原則としており、引受利益（好条件時は 93-94% CR）を保ちながらポリシー件数（PIF）成長を最大化する。FY2013 年は前年比高成長に回復し、2014 年も直接チャネルで「high-double digit」の新規申込成長を継続している。
PGR.evidence: our relative core principle of a 96% and grow as fast as we can... on the direct side, we're actually seeing very strong growth and high-double digit growth with new applications.

PH.claim: Parker-Hannifin は世界一のモーションコントロール企業として、115の事業部門にわたる多様なモーションコントロール技術を保有しており、複数技術をシステムとして束ね顧客のコストを削減するバンドリング能力を有する。
PH.evidence: we are excited about these opportunities that will position Parker to be an even stronger leader as the #1 motion control company in the world; we try to get away from price per se, but bottom line is still positive...we really address our customers' cost issue, and we do that through bundling technologies and helping them take costs out of their system

PH.claim: Parker-Hannifin は14期連続でキャッシュ/売上比率10%超を達成しており、複数景気後退を経ても一貫したキャッシュ創出力を示している。
PH.evidence: This is the 14th consecutive year of cash to sales greater than 10%, excluding discretionary pension contributions. This is strong, consistent performance despite several downturns over that time frame.

PH.claim: Parker-Hannifin の簡素化イニシアチブは、115の事業部門のうち約20%に製品チャーター重複があり、統合によるスケールメリットと重複間接費削減が可能であることを示している。
PH.evidence: we have, as a starting point, we have 115 operating divisions around the world. When we look at those divisions, we see about 20% of them that have overlaps in product charter or product technologies that would benefit from combining them and getting more scale in synergies on both growth and on costs. So we're going to look at that 20%. We'll probably take about 10% of our total operating divisions and reduce that as a result of that overlap.

PH.claim: Parker-Hannifin は売上が11%減少した環境下でも調整後セグメント営業利益率を14.9%に維持し、FY2015通年でも50bpの利益率改善を達成した（前年14.4%→14.9%）。
PH.evidence: We delivered total adjusted segment operating margins of 14.9%. This compares to 15.0% adjusted in last year's fourth quarter. Holding adjusted segment operating margins flat while sales declined 11% is a nice accomplishment.; we delivered a 50 basis point improvement on adjusted operating segment margins despite the sales decline, and reached 14.9% compared to 14.4% in fiscal 2014.

PH.claim: Parker-Hannifin の多様な技術バンドリングアプローチにより、顧客は部品サプライヤーを変更するとシステム統合コストが発生するため、顧客の粘着性を高めている。
PH.evidence: we really address our customers' cost issue, and we do that through bundling technologies and helping them take costs out of their system; we continue to gain market position by helping our customers decrease costs in that sector and really using our system applications, and we've introduced some new technology developments that's really positioned us well as we go forward

PH.claim: FY2015Q4: PH売上11%減（うち為替6%、有機-5%）、調整後EPS $1.43（前年$2.06）、営業キャッシュフロー$511M（売上比16.2%）。FY2016ガイダンス：調整後EPS $6.65-$7.35（中央値$7.00）、調整後セグメント利益率15.2-15.6%。
PH.evidence: Sales declined 11% in the fourth quarter, as the effects of changes in currency rates negatively impacted us by 6%, and organic sales declined 5%; Adjusted earnings per share for Q4 was $1.43 versus $2.06 for the same quarter a year ago; guidance on an adjusted earnings per share basis is $6.65 to $7.35 or $7 at the midpoint

PH.claim: Parker-Hannifin のコスト構造変革（$100M再編費用→$70M節約）と分散型P&L維持の組み合わせは、売上が横ばいでも利益率50bp改善（14.9%→15.4%）を達成する設計であり、景気サイクル全体での長期収益性を支援する。
PH.evidence: adjusted segment operating margins are forecasted to be between 15.2% and 15.6%. This compares to 14.9% for 2015 on an adjusted basis; Savings from these business realignment initiatives are projected to be $70 million

PH.claim: Parker-Hannifin は北米航空宇宙セグメントで商業OEM量産サイクルの恩恵を受け、開発費の低減により利益率が100bp改善（12.5%→13.5%）しており、長期的な航空宇宙契約から安定収益が見込まれる。
PH.evidence: For the full year '15, operating margin adjusted for the realignment cost was 13.5% of sales versus 12.5% in the prior year...which is largely attributed to the reduction of development costs as a percent of sales and our increased OEM commercial volume; we're going to get 100 basis points higher margins in Aerospace, which is also helping drive the total company's margins up

PPG.claim: PPG IndustriesはComex買収（メキシコ最大の塗料ブランド）を含むポートフォリオ管理で2014年に調整後EPSを27%増加し、数年連続で20%以上の調整後EPS成長を達成。$3.2億をM&Aと自社株買いに投下し、積極的ポートフォリオ管理による複合的収益成長を実現。
PPG.evidence: Our adjusted earnings per diluted share was $9.75, up 27% versus our prior year record. We have delivered at least 20% adjusted earnings per share growth for several consecutive years, clearly illustrating the benefits of our active portfolio management; our actual cash deployed relating to acquisitions and share buybacks for 2014 alone totaled about $3.2 billion

PPG.claim: PPGはAkzoNobel北米建築塗料事業の買収シナジーを目標より1年前倒しで達成（2014年）。Comexはメキシコ最大の塗料チェーンでミッドティーン%のEBIT利益率を誇る高品質ブランド。PPGのグローバルブランドポートフォリオは地域多様性とブランド力を組み合わせている。
PPG.evidence: we have realized 1 year ahead of schedule the targeted run rate of acquisition synergies relating to our 2013 acquisition of AkzoNobel's North American architectural coatings business; Comex had partial quarter sales of about $175 million, with a mid-teen percentage return on sales reflective of the quality of the business

PPG.claim: PPGは115年連続配当支払い・43年連続増配（2014年10%増）を達成。Comex以前から活発なM&Aとポートフォリオ最適化（Transitions Optical JVを$17億税引き前で売却）を通じて継続的な株主価値創造能力を有している。
PPG.evidence: I will remind everyone that we have paid a dividend for 115 consecutive years and raised our annual dividend payout for 43 consecutive years; we continued our heritage of returning cash to our shareholders, with more than $1.1 billion returned for the year through dividends and share repurchases

PPG.claim: PPGの全地域（米加・欧・アジア太平洋）での2014年Q4ボリューム成長（米加+5%、アジア太平洋+5%）は、グローバルな製品ラインナップと顧客関係によるサイクルに逆らった成長能力を示す。Industrial Coatings（各事業でソリッドなボリューム成長）が市場成長率を上回るセグメントも複数。
PPG.evidence: Our sales volumes grew about 4% year-over-year, a growth rate higher than our third quarter level; Our U.S. and Canada business delivered sales volume growth of about 5% year-over-year. Our Asia-Pacific region also grew 5%; we have several businesses that have outpaced the global growth rates

PPG.claim: PPGの欧州事業は通貨逆風（欧州通貨安）下で2014年に$1億超（+21%）の利益改善を達成した。コスト管理能力とポートフォリオ最適化（欧州での選択的投資）が地域経済停滞下でも利益成長を実現する運営能力を示す。

QIA.claim: QIAGEN's QIAsymphony automation platform creates high switching costs through multi-year reagent rental agreements: once a laboratory installs QIAsymphony and trains staff on its workflow, switching to a competitor's platform requires capital expenditure, workflow revalidation, and staff retraining.
QIA.evidence: We clearly have seen a shift in terms of customer QIAsymphony placements in terms of how customers are going to buy these instruments. We see more and more customers going for, what we call, reagent models, meaning, they don't pay the instrument upfront but rather pay it -- we are a long-term commitment in consumables and an increased consumable price.

QIA.claim: QIAGEN's QuantiFERON-TB test has been designated as the modern Gold Standard for latent tuberculosis detection, with regulatory approval advantages (FDA-cleared) and growing adoption replacing 120-year-old skin tests, creating a clinically entrenched position that new entrants cannot easily displace.
QIA.evidence: QuantiFERON-TB, which is the modern Gold standard for detection of latent tuberculosis... exceeding $100 million of sales in 2014... benefit from shortages of the 120-year old skin test... Market leadership in the United States and Europe for the modern egra latent TB tests.

QIA.claim: QIAGEN's companion diagnostic co-development agreements with pharmaceutical companies create bilateral switching costs: pharma companies that submit drugs with QIAGEN companion diagnostics for regulatory approval are locked into QIAGEN's platform for the life of the drug.
QIA.evidence: Personalized Healthcare... reached several new agreements for co-development projects with growing interest from pharmaceutical companies following the U.S. regulatory approval of our therascreen EGFR companion diagnostic kit in July... We signed a record number of agreements with pharma companies in 2013.

QIA.claim: QIAGEN's position as the industry leader in commercial bioinformatics (through Ingenuity + CLC bio acquisitions) creates a proprietary intellectual property resource in genomic data analysis software that is essential for next-generation sequencing adoption in clinical diagnostics.
QIA.evidence: A key achievement of 2013 was becoming the industry leader in commercial bioinformatics... through the combination of Ingenuity and CLC bio with our own activities... The quality of our products stands out well ahead of the competition, and the choice of bioinformatics has a major impact on the quality of analysis and interpretation. Even the smallest differences in the quality and accuracy of the bioinformatics can lead to significantly different outcomes. We see our rapidly growing bioinformatics activities as providing a sustainable competitive advantage for years.

QIA.claim: QIAGEN's 88% consumables revenue ratio (vs. 12% instruments) creates a high-margin recurring revenue flywheel: each instrument placement generates a long-term stream of consumable sales, and the growing installed base creates scale advantages in consumable manufacturing and logistics.
QIA.evidence: Consumables and other revenues were 6% constant exchange rate in 2013 and provided about 88% of sales... We are seeing an ongoing shift in the product mix towards consumables and our expectations for rapid growth in bioinformatics further supports this trend.

QIA.claim: QIAGEN's shared service center restructuring (2013 completion) and channel optimization capabilities enable ongoing SG&A leverage, with management targeting significant reduction in operating costs that competitors who lack similar scale cannot replicate.
QIA.evidence: We completed a major efficiency and effectiveness project in 2013... On the SG&A side, clearly the area where we did a lot of changes over the last 12 to 18 months. Just recall what we did on setting up shared-service center, closing down smaller-sized [offices] clearly also fluctuate our different sales channels. I would say that it's an area where we do expect leverage to come... EBIT margin for 2014 has to go at least 100 basis points.

QIA.claim: QIAGEN's 5-growth-driver strategy targets 8-9% organic CAGR from non-HPV business (overcoming 4% HPV headwind for net 4-5% total): QIAsymphony consumable pull-through, QuantiFERON-TB ($100M+), Personalized Healthcare (>$100M, double-digit growth), bioinformatics (incremental), and NGS solutions.
QIA.evidence: We are anticipating about 8% to 9% constant exchange rate growth from the rest of the business... This leads to our guidance, for about 5% -- 4% to 5% constant exchange rate growth in adjusted net sales for 2014... QuantiFERON is set to break through $100 million of sales in 2014... Personalized Healthcare generates more than $100 million of sales and is growing at a good double-digit constant exchange rate pace.

QIA.claim: QIAGEN FY2013: adjusted net sales $1.306B (+5% CER), adjusted operating income ~$355M (27% margin), adjusted net income $275.1M, adjusted EPS $1.14 (target $1.13). Liquidity $380M, net debt $482M (1.1x EBITDA). Operating cash flow $259M. Consumables 88% of revenue at 71%+ gross margin.
QIA.evidence: Adjusted net sales were USD 1.306 billion, and we're up 5% at constant exchange rates... adjusted operating income margin declined to about 27% of sales in 2013... Adjusted net income rose 6% for the year to USD 275.1 million... Consumables and other revenues were 6% constant exchange rate in 2013 and provided about 88% of sales.

QIA.claim: QIAGEN 2014 guidance: 4-5% CER net sales growth (8-9% ex-HPV minus 4ppt HPV headwind), operating margin +100bps to ~26%, adjusted EPS $1.07-$1.09. QIAsymphony target: 250+ new placements. QuantiFERON target: $100M+ sales. GeneReader NGS workflow commercial launch planned.
QIA.evidence: For about 5% -- 4% to 5% constant exchange rate growth in adjusted net sales for 2014... goal is for at least 100 basis points of margin improvement to a level of about 26 percentage points... Adjusted diluted earnings per share are expected to rise to approximately $1.07 to $1.09... QuantiFERON is set to break through $100 million of sales in 2014.

QIA.claim: QIAGEN's bioinformatics platform (Ingenuity + CLC bio) benefits from network effects as more clinical data from more sequencers and more disease types improves the quality of genomic analysis algorithms, creating a data-driven virtuous cycle that widens the quality gap vs. smaller competitors.
QIA.evidence: No other supplier has a workflow covering this complete workflow, especially in terms of the dry lab bioinformatics. We view bioinformatics as a differentiating, value-creating product... The quality of our products stands out well ahead of the competition... bioinformatics is set to be an important incremental contributor in 2014.

REE.claim: Red Eléctrica holds the statutory monopoly on Spain's electricity transmission grid as the designated Transmission System Operator (TSO), creating an absolute legal barrier to entry that no competitor can circumvent regardless of capital availability.
REE.evidence: Revenues were boosted mainly because of the revenues generated by new facilities brought online. The company's net revenue climbed to EUR 1,822.6 million, which is almost 95% of it coming from electricity transmission.

REE.claim: Red Eléctrica's regulatory expertise and track record in navigating Spanish electricity sector reforms enables it to optimize remuneration parameters (useful life extensions, availability incentives, construction margins) in ways that improve returns from the regulatory baseline, creating a durable efficiency advantage.
REE.evidence: The new methodology is transparent, stable and predictable... A realistic scenario based on proper adequate management of the various processes would see returns on new investments rising from 4.6% to over 6%... by continuing to achieve new process efficiencies the company should obtain superior returns or higher returns to those projected.

REE.claim: Red Eléctrica's position as Spain's sole TSO creates network-level scale economies: a single operator managing the entire national transmission system optimizes dispatch, interconnection and system balancing at lower per-unit cost than fragmented ownership would allow.
REE.evidence: Red Eléctrica's revenues are predictable moving forward... bringing interconnection with France and Portugal online... making the entire Spanish electricity system more flexible... 776 kilometers of circuits online and 2,525 MVAs of transformer capacity which came into service.

REE.claim: Red Eléctrica's proactive debt management capability - replacing EUR 800M bonds (4.75% coupon) with 1.5% coupon bonds and maintaining 88% fixed-rate debt at 5.7-year average maturity - creates a financial process advantage that lowers WACC relative to regulatory baseline.
REE.evidence: 88% of our debt is at fixed rate to term... EUR 800 million bond maturity that was just been... being replaced by much cheaper bonds about 1.5% is the coupon... cost of debt, the average costs will be closer to 3.5%... average cost of debt rose slightly to 3.84%, while the average term to maturity stands at 5.7 years.

REE.claim: Red Eléctrica's ownership of Spain's strategic interconnection infrastructure (France, Portugal, Balearic Islands) and optical fiber network creates infrastructure monopolies that cannot be replicated, supporting diversified revenue beyond core transmission.
REE.evidence: The most important investments in 2014 include, bringing interconnection with France and Portugal online... Almaraz-Guillena line, which guarantees the quality of supply to Extremadura and Andalusia... the Guillena-Puebla de Guzmán line which alongside the Almaraz-Guillena line strengthens the connection with Portugal... Mallorca-Ibiza interconnection investments.

REE.claim: Red Eléctrica's strong cash generation (EUR 974M free cash flow in 2013) relative to EUR 600M investment and EUR 319M dividend enables a disciplined capital allocation model that maintains investment grade ratings while funding growth, creating a financial process advantage for sustained returns.
REE.evidence: Red Eléctrica's excellent performance in generating cash. EUR 974 million, which it earmarked for investments of close to EUR 600 million, and dividends of EUR 319 million in 2013... Recurring EBITDA meanwhile rose at a rate of 5.9%. The dividend proposed to the shareholders at the General Meeting was EUR 2.5422 per share, which is 7.5% more.

REE.claim: Red Eléctrica's CAGR is regulated by formula: EUR 1,685M transmission revenue in 2015, growing 3% annually through 2019 as per Ministry projections, with additional upside from above-baseline operational efficiency (returns from 4.6% baseline to 6%+).
REE.evidence: This approach sets Red Eléctrica's transmission tariff revenue in 2015 at approximately EUR 1,685 million rising by 3% over the period 2015 to 2019... A realistic scenario based on proper adequate management of the various processes would see returns on new investments rising from 4.6% to over 6%.

REE.claim: Red Eléctrica FY2013: net revenue EUR 1,822.6M (95% from transmission), recurring EBITDA EUR 1,369M (+5.9%), net profit EUR 558M (+8.8% pro forma), dividend EUR 2.5422/share (+7.5%), investments EUR 564M. Net debt EUR 4,541M at average 3.84% cost, 88% fixed rate.
REE.evidence: The company's net revenue climbed to EUR 1,822.6 million... Our EBITDA in like-for-like terms rose to EUR 1,369 million, which is up 5.9%... pro forma profit for the year was EUR 558 million which is 8.8% higher... dividend proposed EUR 2.5422 per share... debt totaled EUR 4,541 million at December 2013... average cost of debt rose slightly to 3.84%.

REE.claim: Red Eléctrica 2014 transmission tariff: EUR 1,622M from transmission + EUR 14M availability incentive + EUR 56M system operation payment = total EUR 1,692M regulated revenues. Net profit guidance: +4% to +5% vs. FY2013 (implying ~EUR 540-550M). CapEx 2014: EUR 515M.
REE.evidence: Red Eléctrica tariff from transmission will amount to EUR 1,622 million, plus an availability incentive of EUR 14 million and a payment for system operation of EUR 56 million... Red Eléctrica has forecast a net profit revised by between 4% and 5% in 2014... amount for 2014 will amount to approximately EUR 515 million.

REE.claim: Red Eléctrica's role as System Operator for Spain creates deep institutional switching costs: all electricity generators, distributors and large consumers depend on REE's balancing, dispatch and interconnection services, making any replacement operationally catastrophic.
REE.evidence: Red Eléctrica's revenues are predictable moving forward... The basic aim of that law is to establish regulation to this sector that guarantees electricity supply with the required quality levels... making the entire Spanish electricity system more flexible.

REGN.claim: EYLEA（aflibercept）は米国の網膜疾患（湿性 AMD、CRVO、DME、RVO）における抗 VEGF 市場でリーディングブランドとなり、FY2014 に米国 EYLEA 売上 17.4 億ドル（前年比 +23%）、FDA 承認製品の抗 VEGF 市場で売上 No.1 を達成した。EYLEA の市場シェアは wet AMD 50%（2014 年末で ranibizumab を上回る）、承認抗 VEGF 市場の 53% に達した。
REGN.evidence: EYLEA is now the market-leading brand in anti-VEGF therapy for the treatment of retinal diseases in the United States... EYLEA was approved by the FDA... survey of 201 retinal specialists... the market share for EYLEA in wet AMD in the United States is higher than that for ranibizumab. FDA-approved therapies currently hold about 56% of the overall wet AMD market.

REGN.claim: REGN は FY2013 全売上 70% 以上成長（EYLEA US 売上 14.09 億ドル、+70% YoY）を達成した後、FY2014 も 23% 成長を維持。FY2015 は 25〜30% 成長を予測しており、EYLEA の規模拡大が継続している。海外では FY2014 に x-US EYLEA 売上 10.4 億ドル（前年 4.72 億ドルから +120%）を達成し、欧州・日本・豪州で急速な普及が進む。
REGN.evidence: full year 2013 EYLEA U.S. net sales were $1.409 billion, representing a growth of approximately 70% from the full year 2012... X U.S. EYLEA sales for the full year 2014 were $1.04 billion compared to $472 million for 2013.

REGN.claim: REGN はパイプラインに 3 つの後期ステージ抗体（alirocumab/PCSK9、sarilumab/IL-6R、dupilumab/IL-4Rα）を保有し、いずれも Phase III でポジティブ結果を達成した。5 年以内に 5 つの主要な規制申請・承認が見込まれ、複数の収益源への移行が進行している。
REGN.evidence: We have a robust and advancing pipeline that includes 3 late-stage antibodies: alirocumab, our PCSK9 antibody in Phase III trials for lowering LDL cholesterol; sarilumab, our IL-6 receptor antibody in Phase III trials for rheumatoid arthritis; and dupilumab, our IL-4 receptor alpha antibody... With this late-stage pipeline and potential new indications for EYLEA, we could have 5 major regulatory submissions and/or approvals in the next 5 years.

REGN.claim: REGN の VelocImmune 技術（ヒト抗体生成マウス）は、完全ヒト型モノクローナル抗体を従来法より大幅に速く・安価に開発可能にする独自の創薬プラットフォームである。これにより 25 年で大量のパイプラインを社内創製し、FY2014 時点で臨床段階の抗体 15 本を保有している（全て自社創製）。
REGN.evidence: we founded this company more than 25 years ago with a simple but challenging goal, to build a company that can consistently and repeatedly bring important new medicines to patients in need... we now have 15 antibodies in clinical development for serious diseases, including cancer, retinal conditions, chronic pain and a life-threatening infection.

REGN.claim: REGN の Sanofi・Bayer との協業構造は、開発コストを提携先に分担させながら商業的成功から利益を共有するモデルであり、資本効率の高い成長を実現する。Sanofi は alirocumab・sarilumab・dupilumab の Phase III 費用の 80% を負担し、REGN は 20% のみを拠出。Bayer は EYLEA の x-US 商業化費用を負担する。
REGN.evidence: our obligation to pay for 20% of the Phase III alirocumab and sarilumab clinical development expenses following the first positive Phase III results... Bayer HealthCare continues to be a strong collaborator, and we look forward to their continued execution of their EYLEA launch outside the U.S.

REGN.claim: REGN の Regeneron Genetics Center（RGC）は Geisinger Health System と提携し、次の数年で 10 万人以上のゲノム配列決定（cutoff 時点では 25 万人目標に更新）と電子医療記録との連携を計画している。この人類最大規模の医療ゲノミクスデータは、将来の創薬ターゲット探索において模倣困難な独自資産となる。
REGN.evidence: We intend to sequence in genotype a minimum of 100,000 consented patient volunteer samples in the next few years, making this one of the largest sequencing endeavors undertaken... we are on track to sequence 0.25 million individuals over the next few years and to link this information to their de-identified digital health records.

REGN.claim: EYLEA の DME 適応症での Phase III（VISTA/VIBRANT）では、隔月投与で月次投与と同等の視力改善を達成し、投与頻度の柔軟性において Lucentis（月次投与が必要）に対する優位性を示した。さらに NIH 主導の Protocol T 比較試験でも EYLEA は ranibizumab・bevacizumab を上回る視力改善を示した。
REGN.evidence: EYLEA dosed every other month resulted in visual acuity benefits that were similar to that achieved with monthly dosing... In this study, EYLEA showed significant gains in efficacy when compared to both alternative therapies.

REGN.claim: dupilumab（IL-4Rα 抗体）は IL-4 と IL-13 の両経路を同時にブロックするユニークな作用機序を持ち、喘息・アトピー性皮膚炎・鼻ポリープ等の複数の Th2 疾患に適応できる広範な治療プラットフォームを形成している。Phase IIb 喘息試験では好酸球高値・非高値の両集団でポジティブ結果を示した。
REGN.evidence: dupilumab, our IL-4 receptor alpha antibody, which blocks both the IL-4 and IL-13 pathways... positive response was seen in both the patient population with high blood eosinophils thought to be a marker of allergic disease as well as the overall study population.

REGN.claim: REGN の EYLEA x-US 事業は Bayer HealthCare との協業で、FY2014 に 10.4 億ドル（前年比 +120%）の売上を達成した。x-US 市場で EYLEA は承認抗 VEGF 市場の約 34% シェアであり、US の 53% 対比でさらなる成長余地が大きい。欧州・日本・オーストラリアで既に 40〜50% の湿性 AMD シェアを持つ地域もある。
REGN.evidence: EYLEA currently has approximately a 34% dollar market share of the x U.S. approved anti-VEGF market as compared to a 53% dollar share of the U.S. FDA-approved anti-VEGF market. Therefore, there's ample opportunity for growth through approval on additional indications, further geographic expansion and market share gains.

REGN.claim: REGN は FY2013 の EYLEA 粗利益率 92% を達成し、FY2014 も高水準を維持。製造拠点（Rensselaer NY + Limerick Ireland）の拡張により生産能力を増強し、長期的な税率優位（アイルランド製造による FY2017 以降の有効税率改善）を実現する計画がある。
REGN.evidence: This translates into a gross margin of approximately 92% of sales for the full year... we are making strong progress in our build out of a world-class 400,000 square-foot biologic production and supply chain facility... we project that the benefits of our investment in our global operating model could begin to be reflected in our effective tax rate commencing in 2017.

REGN.claim: REGN は Non-GAAP EPS が FY2013 に +75%、FY2014 に +22% 成長し、EYLEA の複利成長と Sanofi 協業収益が EPS 成長を牽引している。FY2015 の PRALUENT 承認・発売後、複数の大型収益源（EYLEA + PRALUENT + sarilumab/dupilumab 将来）への移行が見込まれる。
REGN.evidence: This represents growth in non-GAAP net EPS of 52% for the 3 months and 75% for the full year 2013... For the full year 2014, we earned $10 per diluted share from non-GAAP net income of $1.18 billion. This represents growth in non-GAAP diluted EPS... of 22%.

REGN.claim: REGN は FY2014 で EYLEA を米国の湿性 AMD において Lucentis（ranibizumab）を上回るシェアに育て、開院開始からわずか 3 年で市場リーダーに到達した。DME 市場でも FDA 承認後に Medicare（98%）・商業保険の大半で迅速に償還認定を取得しており、医療機関・支払者双方での信頼性が確立されている。
REGN.evidence: EYLEA is now the market-leading brand in anti-VEGF therapy for the treatment of retinal diseases in the United States... Currently, all Medicare jurisdictions have coverage and evidence of paid claims for EYLEA in DME, and 98% of commercialize have coverage for EYLEA for DME.

REL.claim: RELXの負の運転資本モデル（前払いサブスクリプション）による高いキャッシュ転換効率：FCF GBP1.15bn、現金転換率96%
REL.evidence: FY2014 Annual (CFO Nick Luff): 'Cash flow from operations GBP1.15 billion, cash conversion 96%.' / 'Return on invested capital 12.8%, up 0.7 percentage points.' / CEO: 'We have a strong cash generative business model...our subscription-based revenues provide good revenue visibility and cash conversion.' / 'Net debt to EBITDA ratio 2.3x within our target range of 2-3x.'

REL.evidence: RELX FY2014: 売上GBP5.77bn（underlying +3%）、調整後営業利益GBP1.64bn（underlying +5%）、調整後EPS 58.4p（CER +10%）、FCF GBP1.15bn（現金転換96%）、ROIC 12.8%（+0.7pp）、ND/EBITDA 2.3x

REL.evidence: 部門別: STM underlying+2%（マージン39.3%）、Risk+6%（マージン33.6%、+110bp）、Legal+1%（マージン25.8%）、Exhibitions+7%ex-cycling（マージン30.0%）。27件買収（GBP385mn）、17件売却（GBP74mn）、GBP600mn自社株買戻し（2015年GBP500mn計画）

RENT.claim: 電子的意思決定ツールへの転換能力（データ解析・アナリティクス統合能力）
RENT.evidence: Q4 FY2014 Prepared Remarks（CEO Erik Engstrom発言）: 'we're now primarily focused on driving the transition from electronic reference to electronic decision tools by adding broader datasets, embedding more sophisticated analytics and leveraging more powerful technology. That transformation from electronic reference to more sophisticated electronic decision tools is driving growth in the U.S. and in Europe'
RENT.overall_reasoning: 電子決定支援ツールへの転換能力は方向性として評価できるが、dogmaルール1（能力≠結果）とルール8（戦略≠優位性）の両面で留保が必要。CEOが「転換を進めている」という戦略的語りをしており、背後の組織的能力（データ統合アーキテクチャ、アナリティクス統合力）の具体的説明が不十分。Wolters Kluwer、LexisNexisとの明示的比較なし。Phase 1で50%と評価されたが、KB2-T Pattern Fとdogmaルール7（純粋競合差別化）の観点から40%に修正

RENT.claim: 電子決定支援ツール転換 → 顧客スイッチングコスト上昇 → 更新率維持・価格プレミアム → 売上CAGR +1-2pp
RENT.evidence: 電子決定支援ツール転換 → 顧客スイッチングコスト上昇 → 更新率維持・価格プレミアム → 売上CAGR +1-2pp
RENT.overall_reasoning: スイッチングコスト→更新率→CAGR接続は論理的に成立するが、更新率の開示データが未確認でトランスクリプトからの直接的裏付けが弱い。+1-2ppという数値の根拠も不透明。優位性（#1）を40%と評価したため、CAGR接続の上限は45%

RENT.claim: Risk & Business Information（Lexis-Nexis Risk Solutions）のデータ・アナリティクス資産とその複数市場への展開能力
RENT.evidence: Q4 FY2014 Prepared Remarks（CEO発言）: 'Risk & Business Information grew 6%...strong underlying revenue growth was driven by volume growth, new product rollouts and adjacency expansion...Insurance saw strong growth driven by demand in the core U.S. auto segment and good takeup of new products in both core and adjacent segments. Strong growth in Business Services was driven by identity and fraud solutions'
RENT.overall_reasoning: Risk & BI事業のデータ資産は実質的な競争優位だが、トランスクリプトでは成長率（結果）の報告が中心で、能力（データ収集・統合・モデル化）の具体的説明が不十分。KB2-T Pattern A（結果→優位性の転倒）に該当。Verisk vs RELXの純粋競合比較なし。40%に修正

RENT.claim: Risk & BI データ資産 → 保険・政府・fraud領域での独自ソリューション → 継続的な隣接展開 → 6%+成長維持

RMD.claim: AirSense 10 / AirCurve 10プラットフォームとhealthcare informatics（AirView、U-Sleep）の統合により、Q4 FY2015で定数通貨ベース+17%の収益成長と米州flow generator販売+53%を達成した。
RMD.evidence: our global team achieved double-digit revenue growth of 17% on a constant currency basis during the quarter. This is our best performance in over 4 years and quite an achievement on the robust foundation of a $1.7 billion global business. In our Americas region, we achieved double-digit revenue growth [...] America's flow generator growth of over 50% for the quarter. This exceptional result was driven by the ongoing success of the AirSense 10 and the AirCurve 10 platforms, and it was powered by our health care informatics solutions, including AirView, U-Sleep and myAir.

RMD.claim: U-Sleepは在宅医療提供者の労働コストを最大60%削減し、患者adherenceを向上させる機能（テキスト・メール・IVR）を提供する独自のhealthcare informatics能力を持つ。
RMD.evidence: U-Sleep's core value proposition is to increase patient adherence while also lowering HME labor costs by up to 60%. In a fast competitive bidding world, this type of cost reduction and efficiency improvement is a necessity for our home care provider customers. The ability for U-Sleep to text, email and to use interactive voice response, or IVR, has been well received by patients and helps coach them on their treatment journey. The net result is increased adherence, which is good for everyone in the supply chain and the value chain.

RMD.claim: EasyCare OnlineおよびAirViewなどのhealthcare informaticsプラットフォームがフランス・欧州全体でtelemonitoring規制（2014年10月施行）への対応需要と結びつき、顧客のデータシステム依存度を高めている。
RMD.evidence: In France, the previously announced telemonitoring requirements went into effect October 1, right at the start of the quarter. We believe this development started to help and will help grow our share in Flow Generators in the region. The emerging focus on healthcare informatics in France and throughout Europe as it grows plays to ResMed's strength. We are seeing interest in EasyCare Online solutions, both within France, but now outside France in various parts of Europe, where customers recognize EasyCare Online is efficient and provides adherence benefits and high quality. It also has incredibly strong and robust data protection that is increasingly important for these markets.

RMD.claim: ResMedはSERVE-HF（1,325患者・心不全治療の大規模臨床試験）を15ヶ月間fully enrolledで運営し、心不全患者への呼吸療法の効果に関する独自の臨床データ基盤を構築している。
RMD.evidence: SERVE-HF, our 1,325-patient clinical trial in heart failure has now been fully enrolled for 15 months. Our partners in SERVE are focused on event-driven data collection in the clinical trial size. We currently expect the first publication from this study during calendar year 2016.

RMD.claim: ResMedは知的財産（特許）防衛において米国ITC・ドイツ裁判所双方で台湾メーカーに対する勝訴を得ており、独自技術（加湿特許・ヘッドギア設計）の排他的保護を実現している。
RMD.evidence: These last few weeks have seen 2 victories for ResMed over a small Taipei-based competitor. The first win was in the U.S. in the International Trade Commission, where the ITC ruled that, despite a redesign of its iCH CPAP device, the Taiwanese device manufacturer continued to infringe ResMed's humidification patents. Also in Germany, we won a permanent injunction against the same manufacturer, prohibiting sales of infringing headgear used on 2 of its mask systems.

RMD.claim: ResMedは$1.7Bのグローバル収益基盤を持ち、50%が米州外に分散されており、米国の競争的入札（CB2）の逆風を欧州・アジアの高成長でヘッジできる地理的スケールを有する。
RMD.evidence: The benefit of having around 50% of our revenue outside the U.S., particularly in tough times like this in the U.S., was well exhibited during fiscal year '14 and especially during Q4.

RMD.claim: AirFit P10（2014年1月発売）はカテゴリー最軽量・50%静音化を実現し、AirFit N10・F10（Q4 FY2014発売）と合わせてAirFitシリーズ全体の製品革新が競合に対する明確な技術優位性を示す。
RMD.evidence: The AirFit P10 is literally whisper quiet. It is also 50% lighter, weighing in at just 1.6 ounces. And finally, its revolutionary vent technology, which we call QuietAir, gently defuses the air, minimizing disturbance to both the patient and their bed partner. [...] we promised to launch 3 new mask systems during the back half of fiscal '14, and we have delivered on that promise. With the global launch now of the AirFit family of masks, ResMed continues to lead in product innovation, particularly in this mask category.

RMD.claim: ResMedは睡眠無呼吸の中核事業（Horizon 1）から、呼吸器ケア（COPD・神経筋疾患、Horizon 2）および心不全・心房細動（Horizon 3）へと「3 Horizons」戦略で拡張し、純粋な睡眠機器メーカーが模倣困難なビジネスモデルを構築している。
RMD.evidence: We're also making progress against our Second Horizon of growth, which includes both the respiratory care market and new geographic market expansion opportunities. [...] Our Third Horizon of growth focuses on cardiorespiratory and other new market opportunities. [...] We are the global leaders in sleep and respiratory medicine, not just in market share but more importantly, in product, service, channel and market innovation.

RMD.claim: ResMedはシンガポール製造拠点により実効税率を20~21%に抑制し、FY2016に向けて航空便から海運への輸送移行・調達・生産・物流コスト削減プログラムによるグローバル製造コスト構造改善を実施している。
RMD.evidence: we are moving more and more of our shipping volume from airfreight to sea freight as we continue to ramp our product launches; second, we are reducing supply chain costs with significant and sustained internal and external cost-out programs throughout FY '16; and third, we continue to grow incremental manufacturing volume in our lower-cost plans. [...] The lower tax rate this quarter reflects the tax benefit from the restructure charge and the ongoing benefit of lower effective tax rate associated with our Singapore manufacturing operations.

RMD.claim: ResMedは「グローバル睡眠・呼吸医療のリーダー」というブランドポジションを持ち、UCSD $5Mの研究寄付・APSS学会でのCMO発表・KOL（心臓専門医）ネットワークを通じた医療機関への信頼醸成を継続している。
RMD.evidence: We are the global leaders in sleep and respiratory medicine, not just in market share but more importantly, in product, service, channel and market innovation. [...] We announced the acquisition of [...] $5 million donation for medical research into sleep apnea and COPD to help create a center for excellence in this field at the University of California - San Diego. We believe that academic industry partnerships like this are critical to the ongoing innovation in the fields of both sleep and respiratory medicine.

RMD.claim: healthcare informaticsとして位置付けられたAirView/U-Sleep/myAirのデータプラットフォームが、医療提供者の患者管理業務フローに組み込まれることで、ResMedデバイスと代替できないITシステム依存を形成する。
RMD.evidence: we have now established health care informatics as a core competence for ResMed. We will continue to build HI capabilities and buy them, when appropriate, so that we can drive channel efficiencies, unlock cost savings and ultimately, improve patient outcomes. [...] Our recent acquisition of CareTouch allows us to add key features to our resupply offerings. CareTouch is a provider of Internet-based solutions and resupply programs for the homecare industry.

RMD.claim: ResMedは睡眠無呼吸の世界市場を6~8%の長期成長率と評価し、市場未診断率が高いこと（vast majority of sleep apnea sufferers are still not aware）を長期成長ドライバーとして明示している。
RMD.evidence: We believe the long-term global growth rate for our industry remains in the 6% to 8% range. [...] The more consumers become aware of the importance of sleep and aware of any risky breathing or suffocation they have during the night, the better for addressing the vast majority of sleep apnea sufferers, who are still not aware of their condition and have not yet seen a doctor about their problem.

ROG.claim: 統合型ファルマ・診断薬プラットフォームによるパーソナライズドヘルスケアの実現能力
ROG.evidence: Q4 FY2014 Prepared Remarks (Dan O'Day): 'we have an ability — a unique opportunity to combine many, many agents around this immunotherapy circle.' And: 'Foundation Medicine...gives us even a more comprehensive look at our portfolio.' Also Roland Diggelmann: '250 projects internally between our Pharma and other diagnostics entity.'

ROG.claim: ファルマ+診断薬統合 → コンパニオン診断薬増加 → 承認加速・パイプライン成功率向上 → 売上CAGR + 2-3pp

So we're building up an extra and a first manufacturing site in China'

ROST.claim: Ross Storesはオフプライス小売モデルにより、フルプライス百貨店やブランド小売が採用すれば自社ブランドと価格ポジションを毀損するような「compelling bargains on wide assortments of name brand fashions」を提供しており、競合はこのモデルを模倣するインセンティブを持たない。
ROST.evidence: customers responded favorably to the compelling bargains we offered on a wide assortment of fresh and exciting name-brand fashions and gifts. [...] the strength of our business model lies in the flexibility of our off-price strategies. [...] we are well-positioned as an off-price retailer [...] We believe off-price will continue to be a strong performing sector.

ROST.claim: Ross Storesは過去数年で店舗在庫を40%超削減しつつ商品粗利益率を継続改善しており（FY2013：+45bp、FY2014：+10bp）、在庫回転率向上と粗利改善を同時達成するリーン在庫管理プロセスが独自の優位性を形成している。
ROST.evidence: operating our business with lean inventories has enabled us to increase the amount of fresh and exciting merchandise customers see when they shop our stores. This has helped in maximizing sales, while also driving faster inventory turns and the resulting higher merchandise margins we saw throughout 2013 and over the last several years. [...] Over the past several years, we have reduced in-store inventories by more than 40%, which has contributed to improved sales and gross margins.

ROST.claim: Ross Storesはpackaway inventoryを全在庫の45-49%維持することで、市場に突発的に大量放出される超優良バーゲン商品を機会購入し、翌シーズン以降の商品力を維持する独自の調達プロセスを持つ。
ROST.evidence: As we ended 2013, total consolidated inventories were up 4% compared to the prior year, while packaway levels were about 49% of total inventories compared to 47% last year. [...] As we ended 2014, total consolidated inventories were up 9% over the prior year while packaway levels were about 45% of total inventory compared to 49% last year. [...] To maximize sales, we are staying liquid in our Open-to-Buy, which enables our merchants to capitalize on the best opportunities in a marketplace that is currently flushed with terrific bargains.

ROST.claim: Ross Storesはマンハッタン縫製地区（Manhattan garment district）の核心部にバイヤーオフィスビルを購入し、全米最大のアパレル・ファッションサプライヤーネットワークへの近接性を確保することで、他のオフプライス競合（TJX等）に対する商品調達優位性を持つ。
ROST.evidence: we entered into an agreement last year to acquire a New York buying office building. This is a unique onetime opportunity that will enable us to continue to house all of our New York merchants together, which maximizes their cohesiveness and effectiveness of this critical organization. We continue to believe that keeping our primary buying office in the heart of the Manhattan garment district is a competitive advantage as this location makes it easier for our buying group to strengthen relationships with our large network of suppliers.

ROST.claim: Ross Storesは最終的にRossブランド2,000店・dd's DISCOUNTSブランド500店（合計2,500店超）まで出店可能と評価しており、現時点（約1,300店）から2倍近い店舗拡大余地を持つことで流通・買付・インフラ固定費の更なる希薄化が可能となる。
ROST.evidence: we believe that Ross can ultimately operate 2,000 locations across the United States and that dd's DISCOUNTS can eventually become a chain of 500 stores. [...] we are in the process of making the necessary infrastructure investments to support this long term expansion that will ultimately double our store base.

ROST.claim: Ross StoresのFY2013通期EPS成長は+13%（FY2010 +31%、FY2011 +24%、FY2012 +20%）と複数年にわたる高い利益成長軌跡を示しており、FY2014もEPS $4.42（+14%）、営業利益率13.5%（+13bp）という継続的な収益改善を実現している。
ROST.evidence: fiscal 2013 earnings per share were $3.88, up a solid 13% on a 52- versus 52-week basis over last year. This growth is especially noteworthy, considering it was on top of robust multiyear earnings per share increases of 20%, 24% and 31% in 2012, 2011 and 2010, respectively. [...] For the 2014 fiscal year, earnings per share grew 14% to $4.42, up from $3.88 in 2013. [...] operating margin for the full year increased 13% -- 13 points to 13.5%.

ROST.claim: Ross Storesは1993年以降、毎年計画通りに自社株買いを実施し（20-21年連続）、配当も20-21年連続増配（直近18%増）を達成しており、業務プロセスの予測可能性と安定したフリーキャッシュフロー創出能力を示している。
ROST.evidence: We have repurchased stock as planned every year since 1993 and this is the 20th consecutive annual increase in our quarterly cash dividend. This consistent record reflects our unwavering commitment to enhancing stockholder value and returns. [...] We have repurchased stock as planned every year since 1993, and this is the 21st consecutive annual increase in our cash dividend. [...] Our board recently approved an increase in the quarterly cash dividend to $0.235 per share, up 18%.

ROST.claim: Ross Storesはマーチャンダイジング組織への「strategic investments」を最優先戦略として掲げ、バイヤー人材・組織プロセスが最も重要な競争優位の源泉であることを明示している（「This is the only way to ensure that we can maximize our ability to deliver the best bargains possible」）。
ROST.evidence: our top priority will always be delivering the best values possible to our customers. As a result, we will continue to make strategic investments in merchandising. The people and processes of this critical organization are key to gaining access to the most desirable name brand products available in the marketplace. [...] In order to achieve our financial goals, we must, most importantly, continue to invest in our merchandise organization.

ROST.claim: Ross Storesは年間75新店（Ross）+20新店（dd's）ペースでの出店を継続し、新流通センター2ヶ所（2014年・2015年）の追加投資を行っており、スケール拡大に向けたインフラ構築を自己資金で実施できる財務力を持つ。
ROST.evidence: we are planning to add approximately 75 new Ross and 20 new dd's DISCOUNTS locations. [...] Our plans include the addition of 2 new distribution centers, one that will open in 2014 and another in 2015. [...] Capital expenditures in 2014 are forecast to increase to approximately $800 million. [...] Operating cash flows provided the resources to make capital investments to support our growth and fund our ongoing stock repurchase and dividend program.

ROST.claim: Ross Storesは長期EPS成長目標を年率10-13%と設定し、その達成手段を「ユニット成長（新店）+comparable store sales gains（1-2%）+operating margin flat/slight improvement+stock repurchase」という複合公式として明示している。
ROST.evidence: For the longer term, we are targeting average annual earnings per share growth of 10% to 13%. The formula is based on a combination of unit growth, comparable store sales gains, flat to slight improvement in operating margin and our ongoing stock repurchase program.

ROST.claim: Ross StoresはEコマース展開を意図的に回避しており（「on the commerce side won't be there」）、デジタル化が進む小売業界でオフプライスの「store treasure hunt experience」という物理的差別化に集中することで、オンライン競合が模倣困難なポジションを維持している。
ROST.evidence: Obviously, on the commerce side won't be there. [...] traffic, it's always the same with us. It's all about having the best merchandise in the stores. We found over time that's really the one thing that really stimulates traffic.

ROST.claim: Ross Storesは港湾スト（2015年初）による大量商品入荷混乱を「packawayまたは通常流通」として吸収できるオポチュニスティックな買付能力を持ち、供給不確実性を逆に商品力強化の機会として活用する独自のサプライチェーン能力を示している。
ROST.evidence: port availability, there's been significant port availability and we see that continuing as we go into Q1. Whether the seasonality becomes packaway or flow remains to be determined. [...] we are staying liquid in our Open-to-Buy, which enables our merchants to capitalize on the best opportunities in a marketplace that is currently flushed with terrific bargains.

SAB.claim: アフリカ市場における地域ブランドポートフォリオの支配的ポジション（Africa NPR +10%、vol +5%）と現地生産・流通ネットワークによる競合参入障壁
SAB.evidence: H1 FY2015 Prepared Remarks（CEO発言）: 'In Africa, we achieved another good performance, with net producer revenue up 10% and volumes up 5%... Castle Lite continues to achieve exceptional growth, up more than 20% across Africa... Strong performances from our local brands... Tanzania, South Africa, Nigeria and Ghana all performing well.' (2014-11-13, Alan Clark). CFO補足: 'Africa accounts for our strongest growth region at NPR +10%.'

adjustments: pattern_I_t: 0.0 (Africa NPR +10%・vol +5%という定量的裏付け。Castle Lite +20%以上という高成長ブランドの具体的証拠あり)
rule_12_t: -0.1 (H1四半期発言から。Q4年次総括ではないため-0.1調整)

SAB.claim: ラテンアメリカ（特にコロンビア・ペルー）でのプレミアム化・価格設定力（NPR +7%、vol -4%でも価格/ミックスがカバー）
SAB.evidence: H1 FY2015 Prepared Remarks（CEO発言）: 'In Latin America, we achieved net producer revenue growth of 7%, despite volumes declining 4%... the powerful net revenue management capability we have in Latin America... Colombia delivered very strong performance with NPR well ahead of volume, as did Peru.' (2014-11-13, Alan Clark)

adjustments: pattern_I_t: 0.0 (vol -4%でもNPR +7%という逆張り定量的証拠。価格/ミックス管理能力の実証)
rule_12_t: -0.1 (H1四半期発言から)

SAB.claim: USD 500M コスト効率化プログラム（FY2018完了目標）による構造的マージン改善能力
SAB.evidence: H1 FY2015 Prepared Remarks（CFO発言）: 'We announced the evolution of our operational efficiency program to a target of delivering USD500 million of efficiency benefits by the end of FY2018... We're now targeting 70 basis points of margin improvement per year over the next three years.' (2014-11-13, Jamie Wilson)

adjustments: pattern_G_t: -0.1 (コスト削減プログラムは競合他社（ABInBev・Heineken）も同様の取り組みを推進。SAB固有の差別化要因として弱い)

SAB.claim: Castle Liteプレミアムブランドによるアフリカ全土でのアスピレーショナル消費者獲得（+20%超成長、複数国展開）
SAB.evidence: H1 FY2015 Prepared Remarks（CEO発言）: 'Castle Lite continues to achieve exceptional growth, up more than 20% across Africa... In South Africa, Castle Lite achieved spectacular growth on the back of... its association with premium experiences. Castle Lite is now a top-20 beer brand globally by revenue.' SBNY.claim: Signature Bank の Private Client Banking モデルは、各クライアントに専任チームが単一の窓口として継続的にサービスを提供する（"single point-of-contact"）独自の銀行モデルを採用。このモデルにより、預金は6-7年連続で記録的な成長を達成（FY2013: +$29.7億、FY2014: +$55.6億）し、無利子預金（Non-interest bearing）がFY2014末で総預金の31%（$71億）・前年比+31%に達した。クライアントは専任チームへの依存とそのネットワーク効果から、メガ銀行に高い対抗力で引きつけられており、競合の大手行もこの客層を積極的に狙っているにもかかわらず引き留めに成功している。
SBNY.evidence: The ongoing strong core deposit growth is attributable to the superior level of service provided by all of our private client banking teams who continue to serve as a single point of contact for their clients; for our type of client, they're really wanted by the other institutions... you're wanted by the mega institutions and we're having to fight that competition; Noninterest-bearing deposits of $7.1 billion represented 31% of total deposits and grew $1.67 billion or 31% for the year

SBNY.claim: Signature Bank は大手行から優秀な銀行チームを継続的に採用する独自のモデルを確立しており、採用したチームは前職よりも高いパフォーマンスを発揮する。例として、2007年末に採用した商業不動産チームはCapital One/North Forkでの実績を上回る成果を出した。2012年に採用したSignature Financial（設備リース・ファイナンス）チームは、前職（$45億規模）での「bureaucracy」から解放されて急成長中（2014年末残高$26億）。各チームは長年培った顧客関係・ニッチ専門性・ネットワークを持ち込み、Signature Bankの規模・文化・柔軟性の中で倍増させるプラットフォームが機能している。
SBNY.evidence: teams that come on board here can do better over time than where they came from; the bureaucracy that they had to put up with at their prior institution really put the breaks in their business. So we would expect that they can grow to that $4.5 billion and beyond here; That team has now surpassed their outstandings here at Signature compared to what they did at North Fork Capital One

SBNY.claim: Signature Bank の「Private Client Banking only・広告なし・single point-of-contact」モデルは、JPMorgan Chase・Bank of America等のメガ銀行が模倣しようとすると既存のリテール戦略を毀損する構造を持つ。メガ銀行はリテール顧客を維持するため低コスト・大量取引モデルに依存しており、専任チーム制の高コスト・高サービスモデルへの転換はカニバリゼーションを引き起こす。Signature Bankは「we use our balance sheet and our capital to attract quality clients... we always talk about the cleanliness of our balance sheet」という明確な差別化を持ち、Forbes 2015年「Best Bank in America」に選出された。
SBNY.evidence: we are competing against the too big to fail, mega institutions, we always talk about the cleanliness of our balance sheet and the strength of our capital; since we don't advertise, #1, and #2, since we're competing against the too big to fail; Signature Bank being named the Best Bank in America by Forbes for 2015

SBNY.claim: Signature Bank はニューヨーク商業不動産・マルチファミリーローン市場での独自の引き受けプロセスを確立しており、複数の建物・ローン・鑑定業者・環境評価会社が関わる複雑な取引を「迅速に実行できる」という評判を持つ。2013年Q4に$2.09億（86建物・49ローン）と$2.41億（36建物・29ローン）という複雑な大型取引を短期間で完結させたことで、次の大型案件紹介を獲得した。このオペレーション上の実行力が既存チームの競争力を高め、資産の質維持（不良債権比率23bps→12bps）を達成。
SBNY.evidence: there was a time that they needed to get these transactions done quickly... because getting these transactions done and executed well, it's allowing our team in Melville to see other transactions this quarter; non-accrual loans at only 8 basis points of total assets; the coverage ratio further improved to a very strong 783%; Watchlist credits increased slightly by $3.4 million this quarter to $117.5 million or a low 0.66% of loans

SBNY.claim: Signature Bank のSignature Financial（設備リース・ファイナンス子会社）は、2012年の大型チーム採用後わずか3年以内に$26億超の残高を構築し、前職での$45億規模の実績再現を目指している。National Franchise Finance・Commercial Marine Financeという新ビジネスラインの追加により収益の多様化と規模拡大を両立。効率性比率は2013年Q4の35%→2014年Q4の34.1%へ改善し、大規模な採用・投資をこなしながらも業務効率が改善するという規模の経済が機能している。
SBNY.evidence: they can grow to that $4.5 billion and beyond here; Signature Financial's overall balances are a little over $2.6 billion now; the bank's efficiency ratio still improved slightly to 34.1% for the 2014 fourth quarter compared with 35% for the 2013 fourth quarter; We added 2 new business lines to Signature Financial: National Franchise Finance and Commercial Marine Finance

SBNY.claim: Signature BankはForbes 2015年「Best Bank in America」に選出されており、無広告でありながら高品質クライアント（プロフェッショナルサービス企業、ニューヨーク不動産事業者、法律事務所等）を引きつけるブランド力を有する。「we use our balance sheet and our capital to attract quality clients... since we don't advertise」という戦略は、評判（reputation）による差別化モデルを示す。非利子付預金の31%維持は顧客の信頼を反映している。
SBNY.evidence: Signature Bank being named the Best Bank in America by Forbes for 2015; we use our balance sheet and our capital to attract quality clients. Since we don't advertise; our seventh consecutive year of record earnings... our 21st consecutive quarter of record earnings

SBNY.claim: Signature Bank の記録的成長実績: FY2013: 純利益$2.29億（前年比+23%）、預金+$29.7億（+21%）、ローン+$37.5億（+38%）、NII+18%、効率性比率35%（改善）、非不良債権比率23bps（5年最低水準）。FY2014: 純利益$2.97億（前年比+30%）、預金+$55.6億（+33%）、ローン+$43.4億（+32%）、NII+23.6%（+$1.53億）、効率性比率34.1%（過去最高）、非不良債権比率12bps。2015年見通し: 費用増加（規制対応でmid-teen%）、NIM安定から微低下、ローン成長継続（Q1 2015はQ1 2014の$6.99億超を見込む）。
SBNY.evidence: delivered a 30% increase in net income to a record $296.7 million; deposits increased $5.56 billion, core deposits increased $4.14 billion; expanded net interest income by $152.8 million or 23.6%; loans grew a record $4.34 billion and represent 65.4% of total assets

SBNY.claim: Signature Bank の主要財務数値（2013-2014年）: 総資産2014年末$273億（前年比+22%）。ローンポートフォリオ2014年末$178億（総資産の65.4%）。預金2014年末$226億（うち無利子預金$71億=31%）。Tier 1リスクベース自己資本比率13.49%（要件を大幅超過）。引当金カバレッジ比率783%。不良債権残高$2,100万（ローン総額の12bps）。Signature Financialの残高$26億超（Marine Finance・Franchise Finance追加）。ABL残高$1億未満（前職での$2-3億目標に向けて成長中）。オフィス数28店舗（格林威治CT・ベイリッジBK追加予定）。
SBNY.evidence: total assets this year, which reached $27.3 billion; nonaccrual loans decreasing to $21 million or 12 basis points of total loans; tangible common equity ratio of 9.14%, Tier 1 risk-based of 13.49%; the coverage ratio further improved to a very strong 783%; Signature Financial's overall balances are a little over $2.6 billion now

SCMN.claim: Swisscom holds #1 broadband infrastructure position in Europe by measured vs advertised speed (Akamai), with 83% FTTH/VDSL coverage and best LTE network in Europe (Gartner), creating a durable local access advantage that competitors cannot easily replicate.
SCMN.evidence: We are absolutely leading the broadband infrastructure race in Europe with 83% of FTTH VDSL coverage... Akamai just published again their results, clearly showing that Swisscom is clearly leading when it comes to measured versus advertised speed... We have the best performing LTE network in Europe by Gartner.

SCMN.claim: Swisscom's CHF 1.7 billion annual Swiss network investment creates a scale-based barrier through ultra-broadband rollout that smaller competitors and cable operators cannot match, sustaining first-mover advantage in FTTS/FTTH deployment.
SCMN.evidence: We invest only in Switzerland CHF 1.7 billion. We are certainly in a phase where we have to increase our CapEx or be on this high level... Without such investments, long term, I think, you get really, really in trouble.

SCMN.claim: Swisscom's bundling strategy centered on TV drives very low churn through multi-product lock-in, with 72% of TV products sold in bundles and 33% bundle revenue growth, making customer switching economically and practically difficult.
SCMN.evidence: TV is still the major driver of bundling, it's 72%. 72% of the TV products, which are sold in Switzerland are in bundles and that's extremely important because it enables us to decreased the churn. We have very low churn figures in Switzerland because of our bundling strategy... bundle revenue is increasing [by] 33%.

SCMN.claim: Swisscom's Infinity flat-rate mobile plan forces competitors into a pricing disadvantage: incumbents cannot match unlimited data without cannibalizing higher-ARPU plans, while Swisscom benefits from ARPU growth within Infinity as customers upgrade.
SCMN.evidence: We launched Infinity in 2012... we were not dependent on metered revenues... After having launched Infinity, we had at least 3 quarters of optimizing of the existing base... we have a very clear trend now here, which is... 3 consecutive quarters of blended ARPU growth within the Infinity population.

SCMN.claim: Swisscom's B2B ICT convergence position creates high switching costs through integrated IT+telecom outsourcing with a strong order book, serving enterprise clients (particularly banking) with end-to-end managed services that require deep integration.
SCMN.evidence: We merged the IT department with the telecommunication department to really go for converging solution in the B2B market... We had a very strong order intake in 2013 in the B2B area. A lot of this business order intake is coming out of ICT outsourcing business and banking... if we are going in a cloud world, it's fundamental that you have an end-to-end management between network and cloud solution. And for this, Swisscom is in an excellent position.

SCMN.claim: Swisscom's Net Promoter Score advantage (B2B NPS 40, mass market NPS 32-33) significantly above competitors creates a brand-driven price premium that supports margins and reduces churn in Switzerland's price-competitive telecom market.
SCMN.evidence: In the B2B area, we have a Net Promoter Score of 40. In the mass-market units, a Net Promoter score of 32, 33. So you see that we are really performing, and if you compare this with our customers, we have really a big advantage on the customer satisfaction level.

SCMN.claim: Swisscom's All-IP migration program targeting 2018 TDM switch-off, developed through proprietary FTTS/Micro-CAN technology co-developed with vendors, creates a structural cost advantage of CHF 100M annual OpEx savings upon completion.
SCMN.evidence: We commit to 2018 [All-IP migration]... we have started the transformation of our TDM customer base onto the new All-IP stacks... we have started the program last year... We will build our own completely new state-of-the-art cloud environment... OpEx saving in a full non-TDM world, which is 2018 plus of roughly CHF 100 million savings per annum.

SCMN.claim: Swisscom's TV-anchored bundling strategy is the primary CAGR driver: bundle revenue growing 33% (FY2013) and 23% (Q3 2014) is transforming the business from declining single-play to multi-product ARPU expansion, with 70% of the customer base still upsell-eligible.
SCMN.evidence: Bundle revenue is increasing [by] 33%... only 30% of the customer of Swisscom have only one product from Swisscom. So that shows that we have a customer base of 70% where we can do upselling with bundling... the actual bundle penetration overall is 24%. So there is space to push bundles and to increase the ARPU on each customer.

SCMN.claim: Swisscom generated EBITDA of approximately CHF 4.54 billion in FY2014 guidance (confirmed post-Q3), with CapEx of CHF 2.4 billion and group revenue of CHF 11.5 billion.
SCMN.evidence: Revenue remains unchanged at CHF 11.5 billion. EBITDA which we increased after Q2 to about CHF 4.54 billion can also be confirmed in CapEx for the full year 2014, remain unchanged at CHF 2.4 billion.

SCMN.claim: Fastweb (Swisscom's Italian subsidiary) grew service revenue by 5% in EUR terms in Q3 2014, driven by Enterprise (+14M) and Wholesale (+7M) segments, with lower ULL fees supporting EBITDA improvement of CHF 42M.
SCMN.evidence: Fastweb, revenue increase of CHF 18 million, and this is 5% on a year-on-year basis in euro. And the growth of the service revenue is coming mainly out of the Enterprise segment, where we have CHF 14 million increase and the Wholesale segment... The EBITDA of Fastweb increased by CHF 42 million.

SGE.claim: SME向け30年の製品信頼性・ローカルサポート能力（ドイツ・フランス等欧州各国の規制対応ローカルサポートが競合との差別化要因）
SGE.evidence: Q4 Prepared Remarks (CEO Stephen Kelly): 'particularly in our European businesses, is the value and the strength of the local support, being able to pick up the phone or go on the web and deal with someone who understands that compliance regime, that regulatory regime, that detailed, fundamental element that is relevant to, say, the German accounting marketplace. And it just came back stronger and stronger around the quality of the support that Sage provides its customers and the value derived from that and that they are local and available.' And Q&A (CEO): 'win rate of 66% of sales campaigns we're involved in...the customer feedback...3 reasons why they choose Sage X3: one is functionality is superior; secondly, total cost of ownership being less; and the third reason...is around local support'

adjustments.reasoning: SAP/Oracleとの明示的比較なし。ただしSME特化という差別化

kb1_evaluations.reasoning: 90カ国の規制・税務法制対応能力という仕組みを評価。年間の法改正への継続的適応プロセスが能力の核心
SME向け現地規制対応の知識蓄積は競合が短期で模倣困難。Switching Costs + Process Powerの組み合わせ
SMEは大企業と異なり内製コンプライアンス担当を持てない。外部化ニーズが高い業界構造と合致

kb2_patterns.reasoning: Structural market positionパターン適合。SME市場での規制対応という構造的優位

SGE.overall_reasoning: SME向け現地規制対応能力はSwitching Costs + Process Powerとして評価。90カ国対応と年次法改正への適応プロセスが具体的な能力の証明。60%が妥当

SGE.claim: ローカルサポート×規制対応 → クロスセル（既存2Mクライアントへの新サービス） → 経常収益7%成長 → 28%営業利益率維持
SGE.evidence: ローカルサポート×規制対応 → クロスセル（既存2Mクライアントへの新サービス） → 経常収益7%成長 → 28%営業利益率維持

kb1_evaluations.reasoning: 現地サポート→解約率低下→クロスセル→リカーリング成長の2-3ステップ。リカーリング収益77%という開示データで検証可能
Q4発言由来。リカーリング収益6%成長目標として具体化

kb2_patterns.reasoning: 直接的CAGR接続メカニズム適合

SGE.overall_reasoning: リカーリング収益77%という高い比率と6%成長目標が因果メカニズムを支持。60%が妥当

SGE.claim: SMEインストールベース（数百万社）を活用したサブスクリプション移行能力（既存顧客の再活性化・アップグレード・クロスセル戦略）
SGE.evidence: Q4 Prepared Remarks (CFO Stephen Hare): 'we have millions of small and medium-sized businesses that use our products and services...Think about 3 areas where our installed base gives us opportunities: firstly, reactivating existing customers...migrating existing customers to higher value offerings, this drives higher average revenue per user and customer stickiness through migrating existing maintenance and support customers to premium solutions with value-added features; and cross sell, cross sell to existing customers, driving a higher share of wallet from those customers.'

kb1_evaluations.reasoning: 既存SME顧客のクラウドサブスク移行を実現する能力（仕組み）を評価。45%移行率という進捗が能力の証明
クラウド移行率45%（前年比+25%）、Pay Monthly商品での解約率1/3に低下という定量データ

kb2_patterns.reasoning: 定量的差別化パターン。解約率1/3低下という定量的成果

SGE.overall_reasoning: クラウド移行率45%と解約率低下は移行能力の実証。中規模SaaS競合との比較はないが、Sage固有の顧客基盤を活用した移行は差別化要因。60%が妥当

SGE.claim: 欧州規制複雑性を強みに変えるグローバル製品展開能力（欧州各国規制対応ノウハウが参入障壁として機能）
SGE.evidence: Q4 Q&A (CEO Stephen Kelly): 'being a European company and understanding the complexity of the countries around Europe and the different regulatory environment and the compliance requirement, probably they're quite a significant advantage to us...payroll is probably more country specific; but generally, 60% to 70% global requirements; and then the regulatory local requirements are the additional 30%. In some of the core accounting products, it's probably 80%.'

kb1_evaluations.reasoning: 欧州各国の規制複雑性という構造的参入障壁。競合がゼロから構築するコストが高い
欧州のフラグメント化した規制環境という業界構造とSageの現地対応能力が合致

kb2_patterns.reasoning: Structural market positionパターン適合

SGE.overall_reasoning: 欧州の規制複雑性を参入障壁として活用するCornered Resourceとして評価。ただし規制環境は変化する可能性があり持続性に不確実性。60%が妥当

SGE.claim: 2014年FY: 有機成長5%、営業利益率27.5%（目標達成）。経常収益73%（前年比+2ppt）。Sage X3: 4,800顧客、290パートナー、勝率66%。Sage One: 86,000サブスクリプション（+150%）
SGE.evidence: 2014年FY: 有機成長5%、営業利益率27.5%（目標達成）。経常収益73%（前年比+2ppt）。Sage X3: 4,800顧客、290パートナー、勝率66%。Sage One: 86,000サブスクリプション（+150%）

定量的な顧客継続率・解約率の比較データなし

SGE.claim: 2,000名以上のR&Dエンジニア規模によるSME製品開発・ローカライゼーション能力（競合の20-12名と比較して圧倒的規模）

One of the competitors in our space has got 20 engineers, 20, 2-0. Another 1 has got 12 engineers. We've got over 2,000 engineers.'

kb1_evaluations.reasoning: 大手ソフトウェア企業は通常それ以上のR&D人員を抱える。SME特化ソフトウェア会社としての2,000人は業界内での相対的意味が不明確
