SOL.claim: Sasol独自GTL（Gas-to-Liquids）商業化技術とORYX GTL（カタール）での90%以上稼働実績による世界唯一の大規模GTL運営能力
SOL.evidence: H1 FY2014 CEO: 'ORYX GTL achieved 94% utilization for the half year—the highest ever.' FY2014 CEO: 'ORYX GTL achieved 97% annual utilization for FY2014—all-time record. Sasol is the only company in the world to successfully operate commercial-scale GTL facilities.' H1 FY2015: 'ORYX GTL 91% utilization despite earlier-than-planned shutdown in December.' FY2015: 'ORYX GTL average utilization rate 90% despite earlier-than-planned shutdown.'

adjustments.reasoning: Uzbekistan GTLでの技術ライセンス供与検討（H1 FY2015）が技術の外部市場検証として機能
低油価環境でGTL収益性が低下（FY2015でORYXシェア利益ZAR 1.9B vs FY2014 ZAR 3.5B相当）。GTL経済性は油価に連動する構造的制約

kb1_evaluations.reasoning: GTL技術（Fischer-Tropsch触媒・プロセス蓄積）という能力・仕組みを評価。97%稼働率はプロセス管理能力の定量証拠。「世界唯一」という主張は数十年の技術蓄積という能力を反映
97%稼働率（FY2014記録）、90%以上（複数年継続）という定量的裏付けあり。H1 FY2015でも計画外シャットダウンにもかかわらず91%達成
Sasolが世界唯一の大規模商業GTL運営者（Shellも一部有だがSasol技術ライセンス受領側）。競合に対する明確な差別化
天然ガス豊富地域でのGTL需要（カタール、ウズベキスタン）と技術独占の合致。業界構造との整合性高い

kb2_patterns.reasoning: 97%稼働率（記録）という定量的差別化データ。世界唯一という比較可能な事実
GTLプロセス能力（触媒・反応器管理・合成ガス精製）という能力の評価。単なる稼働率実績ではなく背後のプロセス蓄積を評価

SOL.overall_reasoning: 世界唯一の大規模商業GTL運営能力は数十年の技術蓄積に基づくCornered Resource。97%稼働率（FY2014記録）という定量証拠あり（パターンI-T）。プロセス能力として評価可能（パターンIII-T）。競合不在という業界構造との合致も高い。ただし低油価環境下でGTL収益性が直接影響を受ける構造的制約がある。70%が妥当

SOL.claim: GTL技術ライセンス収入新設 × Uzbekistan GTLプロジェクト技術提供 → 中長期的な技術収入多様化（CapEx不要の収益源）
SOL.evidence: H1 FY2015 CEO: 'For Uzbek GTL, we are considering a business model where Sasol would be licensing our technology, supplying catalysts, and providing technical services—without spending additional capital on the project. This licensing model is very favorable to Sasol.'

adjustments.reasoning: H1 FY2015時点でUzbekistan GTLは「ビジネスモデル検討中」の段階。FY2015での追加言及なし。収益規模・収入時期が不明

kb1_evaluations.reasoning: 技術ライセンス→収入という1ステップ接続ではあるが、H1 FY2015時点では「検討中」に過ぎず（'considering a business model'）。具体的契約も収益規模も未確定
ライセンスモデルへの移行は戦略的意思決定（ルール8-T：戦略≠優位性）。能力（GTL技術）は認めるが、ライセンス収入CAGR接続は戦略レベル

kb2_patterns.reasoning: 「ライセンスモデルへのシフト」は戦略的決断（パターンF-T）。技術能力は存在するが、ライセンス収入化の実績がない
技術保有→交渉中→合意→建設→収入という因果チェーンが長く、現時点では交渉段階。実現確度が低い

SOL.overall_reasoning: GTL技術の優位性自体は認めるが、ライセンス収入へのCAGR接続は戦略段階（パターンF-T）。H1 FY2015時点で「検討中」に過ぎず、因果チェーンが長い（パターンC-T）。30%が妥当

SOL.claim: 南アフリカSasol Synfuels（Secunda）の石炭液化（CTL）統合プラットフォームによる独占的エネルギー供給能力と49%超の営業利益率
SOL.evidence: FY2014 CEO: 'Sasol Synfuels achieved 7.6 million tons of production—a decade high. Operating margin is 49%.' FY2015 CFO: 'Secunda Synfuels increased liquid fuels production by 2%, Natref 6%. Total SA liquid fuel sales 60M+ barrels for FY2015.' H1 FY2015: 'Total South African liquid fuel sales volumes expected around 59 million barrels for the year.'

adjustments.reasoning: 低油価環境でエネルギー事業のマージンが圧縮される（FY2015: gross margin -19%）。ただし耐性は高い
南アフリカのCTL操業は炭素税リスクを抱える（H1 FY2015 CEO言及）。長期的な操業コストリスク

kb1_evaluations.reasoning: CTL統合プラットフォーム（採炭→ガス化→合成→精製）という能力・仕組みを評価。49%OPMは単なる結果ではなく、代替不可能なインフラ規模（Scale Economies）の反映
49%OPM（FY2014）、7.6M tons（10年ぶり記録）、油価-33%に対しマージン-19%という3層の定量証拠あり
SA Synfuels統合プラットフォームは構造的優位性（後発参入者が短期間で複製不可能）。2050年まで操業延長決定が示す規模の深さ
南アフリカの液体燃料市場でSecundaが主要供給者（代替なし）という業界構造との合致

kb2_patterns.reasoning: 49%OPM（FY2014）、油価-33%に対しマージン-19%（FY2015）という定量的差別化。業界他社には真似できない垂直統合の証拠
SA市場での構造的独占ポジション（代替供給者不在）。Scale Economiesによる高いバリアー

SOL.overall_reasoning: SA Synfuels CTL統合プラットフォームは代替不可能なScale Economiesの典型例。49%OPMと10年ぶり記録産出は定量的裏付け（パターンI-T）。構造的独占ポジション（パターンIV-T）。低油価耐性も定量的に示されている（-33%油価→-19%マージン）。炭素税リスクと油価連動性を差し引いて70%が妥当

SOL.claim: SA Synfuels独占的地位 × 南アフリカ燃料需要増 → エネルギー事業CAGR安定（グループ収益の90%超を支える）
SOL.evidence: FY2014 CEO: 'Our Southern African energy cluster contributes about 90% of our group profitability.' FY2015 CFO: 'Gross margin in energy business decreased by only 19% despite 33% oil price drop—demonstrating resilience.' FY2015: 'SA liquid fuel sales volumes above 60 million barrels.'

adjustments.reasoning: 低油価環境でエネルギー事業収益が圧縮。FY2015でHEPS -17%（油価-33%環境下）。グループ収益90%依存は低油価感応度が高い
ZAR/USD変動がSA事業収益に影響（10%弱ZAR対比でプラスとマイナス相殺）

kb1_evaluations.reasoning: SA Synfuels独占→グループ収益90%支持という直接的接続（1ステップ）。「90%貢献」は開示済みデータで検証可能
複数年の決算発表での一貫した言及（primary source）

kb2_patterns.reasoning: SA Synfuels独占→SA市場需要→エネルギー事業CAGR支持という直接的接続（1-2ステップ）
「グループ収益の90%」という開示済みの定量データで接続が検証可能

SOL.overall_reasoning: SA Synfuels独占→グループ収益90%という直接的接続は開示データで検証可能（パターンII-T、I-T）。油価-33%でHEPS-17%という耐性データは肯定的。ただしグループ収益の90%がSA Synfuelsに集中しているため、低油価リスクがCAGR見通しを下押し。60%が妥当

SOL.claim: Business Performance Enhancement Programme（BPEP/Project Phoenix）による持続的コスト削減能力（南アフリカPPI以下のコスト増加率維持）
SOL.evidence: FY2014 CEO: 'Normalized cash fixed costs are now below South African PPI for 2 consecutive years—this is the first time in a decade.' H1 FY2015 CFO: 'Cost increases contained to 0.7% vs SA PPI of 6.8%. BPEP target upgraded to ZAR 4.3 billion annual savings by FY16.' FY2015 CFO: 'BPEP achieved ZAR 2.5 billion in actual savings—ZAR 1 billion ahead of ZAR 1.5 billion target.' Implementation cost ZAR 1.9B (ZAR 200M below plan).

adjustments.reasoning: BPEPはFY16で完了予定。FY17以降はインフレ連動（cash fixed costs follow inflation from FY17）。持続的コスト削減能力の構造的定着に疑問

ZAR 2.5B実績（目標ZAR 1.5B超過）、実施費用ZAR 1.9B（計画ZAR 2.1B比節減）、管理層61%削減という多層の定量証拠
BPEPは当初は戦略的プログラムだが、3年以上の継続実施と目標超過達成パターンが組織能力の証左。単純な戦略とは区別できる

目標を毎回超過達成するパターン（ZAR 3B→4B→4.3Bの上方修正 + 実績が目標超過）は高い組織実行力の定量証拠

SOL.overall_reasoning: BPEPは3年以上継続し目標を毎回超過達成する組織実行力を示す（パターンIII-T、I-T）。管理層61%削減・実施費用も計画比節減という二重の超過達成は高い能力証拠。ただしFY16完了後にコスト管理能力が構造的に定着するかは不確実（プログラム終了リスク）。50%が妥当

SRG.claim: Snam は イタリア最大の規制ガスインフラ事業者として、輸送・貯蔵・配送・LNG再ガス化において独占的または支配的なポジションを保持する。2014年推定RAB（規制資産ベース）は約EUR 250億で、イタリアの天然ガスインフラの規制収益基盤を独占的に保有している。これにより固定費の規模的優位性が持続的に発生する。
SRG.evidence: our investments are aimed at increasing the flexibility, liquidity and security of both the Italian and the European system; the estimated RAB at the end of 2013 is around EUR 23.7 billion; Italgas is today the market leader in Italy with 1/3 of the total market share

SRG.claim: Snam はイタリア国内のガス輸送パイプライン（約32,700km）・貯蔵施設（約10.2bcm容量）・LNG再ガス化施設を独占的に保有・運営しており、これらの物理インフラは規制・許認可・地理的制約により複製不可能な希少資源である。TAGおよびTIGFの国際資産も取得し、欧州東西・南北ガス回廊の戦略的ポジションを確立した。
SRG.evidence: around 75% of the overall spending is already authorized; the acquisition of TAG strengthens Snam's leading role amongst infrastructure operators in Europe; the acquisition of TIGF in particular, give us the opportunity to build up a strategic platform for gas infrastructure development in order to improve the cross-border interconnection in Europe

SRG.claim: Snam は複数の規制期を通じて、実質コスト横ばいを維持しながら事業規模を拡大するコスト効率化能力を実証している。2013年に管理可能固定費EUR 4.6億を名目額でほぼ横ばい（実質フラット）に維持しつつ輸送・貯蔵インフラを拡大した。このコスト管理プロセスは規制資産ベースに対する9-10%のEBIT利回りを継続的に創出している。
SRG.evidence: controllable fixed costs resulted equal to EUR 460 million, flat in real terms versus 2012. This is a significant result considering the growth of our activities; maintaining the full permitting us to maintain a return in terms of EBIT to RAB in the range of 9%; we have achieved a satisfactory cost base, and the current regulatory framework partially allows the recognition of the incremental cost related to the growing asset base

SRG.claim: イタリアのガス配送業では177の「ガスエリア」への新規制に基づく入札プロセスが始まり、Snamは国内配送市場の1/3のシェアと1/4以上の既存コンセッションを持つ。市場リーダーとしての地位と既存インフラ（配送網・計量システム）が、競合他社へのスイッチングを困難にしており、Snamは10-12%の市場シェア拡大を低コストで実現できると経営陣が明言。
SRG.evidence: more than 75% of its current business is carried out in gas areas where it holds a relevant market share; we are sure to be very competitive without increase, with marginal cost, we have the possibility, through the auctions, to reach the 40%, 42% of the market, without risk in increasing the operating cost; our objective will be to increase of around 10% -- 10%, 12% the market share in the distribution

SRG.claim: Snam は欧州東西・南北ガス回廊において、Fluxysとの戦略的提携を通じて欧州越境ガスフローの新たな主体（マーケットファシリテーター）としての役割を担う戦略を展開している。TIGFのEquity価値が取得時比40%増（EUR 1.8B超）となり、TAGの長期シップ・オア・ペイ契約（2022年満期）を活用した欧州インフラ統合の独自ポジションを確立した。
SRG.evidence: the value creation of the asset has been recently proved by the investment base Crédit Agricole Assurance, which entered into the shareholder structure with a 10% stake, with an impact value for the 100% of the equity or more than EUR 1.8 billion. This shows the remarkable increase, around 40%; annual revenues largely derived from long-term ship-or-pay contracts expire in 2022, which ensures a high level of cash flow visibility; our role is evolving from being a mere asset owner, simply managing infrastructure to market facilitator providing innovative integrated services to shippers and final customers

SRG.claim: Snam FY2013: EBITDA EUR 28.0億（2012年並み）、純利益EUR 9.17億（+17.7%）、ROCFフロー EUR 16.98億、CapEx EUR 19億。FY2014: 総収益EUR 35.66億、EBITDA EUR 28億（2013年並み）、純利益EUR 11.88億（+30.6%）、負債コスト3.2%（2013年3.7%から低下）。2015-2018戦略: CapEx EUR 51億、RAB成長率年1%。配当EUR 0.25/株（配当利回り約6%）。
SRG.evidence: net profit for the period amounted to EUR 917 million, increased by 17.7% compared to 2012; net profit grew by around 31% to EUR 1,198 million; in 2015, we expect to invest EUR 1.3 billion; cost of debt decreased to around 3.2% versus 3.7% of the last year

SRG.claim: Snamのガス輸送網はイタリア国内に約32,700km、貯蔵容量は約10.2bcm（戦略貯蔵4.5bcm除く）。2014年のRABは約EUR 250億。負債コストは2012年の4%台から2015年に2.9%に低下。イタリアのガス需要は2013年70.1bcm（前年比-6.5%）、2014年も低水準継続。CapExの75%は既に承認済み。
SRG.evidence: the estimation of the RAB at the end of 2013 is around EUR 23.7 billion; in 2013, gas consumption totaled 70.1 bcm, down 6.5% or 4.8 bcm year-on-year; around 75% of the overall spending is already authorized; cost of our debt for 2015 to average around 2.9%

SRG.claim: Snamのガス輸送・貯蔵事業では、シッパーとの長期「シップ・オア・ペイ」契約（TAGで2022年まで）と規制フレームワークにより、安定した収益が保証されている。新ガス配送エリア制度（177エリア）では、既存オペレーターが技術・運営ノウハウの蓄積と既存インフラにより優位に入札できる。新たなスマートメータリング投資（CapEx EUR 4.5億）もSnamのデータ優位性を強化する。
SRG.evidence: Annual revenues largely derived from long-term ship-or-pay contracts expire in 2022, which ensures a high level of cash flow visibility; smart metering project, which will allow Italgas to guarantee a high level of service quality; the gas benefit from a competitive cost structure and strong cash flow generation

STAN.claim: アジア・アフリカ・中東（AAM）新興市場への専門的フォーカスによる市場知識の深さとネットワーク（25市場が$100M超の収益）
STAN.evidence: Q1 2014 Prepared Remarks（CEO発言）: 'We bank the people and companies driving investment, trade and the creation of wealth across Asia, Africa and the Middle East. That\'s the essence of who we are... group income of $18.7 billion was 1% down on 2012, but with 25 markets each now contributing income of over $100 million... the longer-term attractions of Asia, Africa and the Middle East remain compelling. In fact, we expect our markets to do better in GDP growth terms in 2014 than they did in 2013.' (2014-03-05, Peter Sands)

adjustments: pattern_B_t: -0.1 (新興市場特化は他の国際銀行（HSBC等）も同様の戦略を持つ。STAN固有の差別化の説明が弱い)

STAN.evidence: Q1 2014 Prepared Remarks（CEO発言）: 'We are already a top 2 trade bank by SWIFT data. Our goal is to be #1. Of course, Trade income was affected by the sharp fall in margins, but we are clearly well placed to benefit as margins stabilize. STAN.claim: 人民元国際化の先行者優位（Standard Chartered Renminbi Globalization Index +84%、自社RMB決済フロー +122%）と上海自由貿易区での初の越境スウィーピング取引

STAN.evidence: Q1 2014 Prepared Remarks（CFO発言）: 'On 1st of January 2014, our Basel III common equity Tier 1 ratio is 10.9% on a transitional basis and rises to 11.2% on an endpoint basis... STAN.claim: プライベートバンキング・ウェルスマネジメントへの戦略的拡大（AUM $580億・CAGR 30%・$10T市場の潜在性）と中小企業顧客基盤（50,000社）との相乗効果

STAN.evidence: Q1 2014 Prepared Remarks（Deputy CEO発言）: 'A great example is the Africa-to-London corridor, which we are superbly positioned to serve given our extensive African footprint and London advisory and booking center... our advantage is capture them at that juncture, not when they become multibillionaires... those companies are actually family-owned promoter groups, and that\'s the sort of heritage of Standard Chartered.' STX.claim: Seagate の工場稼働管理は競合（WDC）比で在庫水準を 35% 低く維持できる。Q4 FY2015 の四半期中に在庫を 8% 順次削減し、2009年以来最低水準のHDD完成品在庫で四半期終了。これはリーン生産管理能力を示す。
STX.evidence: Inventory levels are 35% below the competition's right now. And we exited Q4 with the lowest level of HDD finished goods inventory value since 2009.

STX.claim: Seagate はニアライン/クラウド向け高容量 HDD 分野で FY2015 に exabyte 出荷 50% 超増加を達成。総出荷 228 exabytes（前年比 13% 増）の中でクラウド領域の占有率が急拡大しており、大量生産によるコスト優位が継続的な顧客獲得に繋がっている。
STX.evidence: Seagate's nearline cloud exabyte shipments increased more than 50%, indicating that we are gaining traction with the higher capacity offerings in our nearline portfolio.

STX.claim: Seagate の 6TB/8TB エア型（非ヘリウム）SMR 駆動の HDD は、ヘリウム充填を不要とする技術プラットフォームを確立しており、低コスト大量生産が可能。競合（HGST）のヘリウム型に対してコスト構造上の優位を主張している。
STX.evidence: We think 6s and 8s on air are a really compelling product from an overall perspective... and those are really low-cost platforms for us because we don't need to use helium.

STX.claim: Seagate はフラッシュメディア非依存のコントローラー技術（Avago から取得）を保有し、最適なフラッシュ供給者を選択できる柔軟性を持つ。メディアを内製する競合（Samsung, Micron）は自社ファブを維持しなければならないが、Seagate は最も安価・最良のフラッシュを選択できる。
STX.evidence: The controller technology, in particular, is very interesting because it's flash-agnostic... we can take that controller technology and apply to whoever has the best flash or the cheapest flash or to a combination thereof.

STX.claim: Seagate は FY2015 で $2.6B の営業キャッシュフロー創出と 65% 超を株主還元（$1.8B）を実現。更に FY2016 に OpEx を 10% 以上削減（通年）し非 GAAP EPS 10% 成長を目標とする。費用管理と資本配分の規律が持続的な競争優位の根拠とされている。
STX.evidence: We returned greater than 65% of our operating cash flow or $1.8 billion to shareholders in fiscal year '15... we expect operating expenses will be comfortably under $500 million a quarter in the second half of fiscal year '16.

STX.claim: HDD 製造において、ヘッドとディスクの複雑性向上（高容量化）により、test time と absorption が増大する。Seagate はこの技術的複雑性の増大を規模経済と結びつけ、大量生産体制が有利に働くと主張している。
STX.evidence: As you move to a 6 and an 8 and a 10 beyond that terabyte drives, the process content inside of the heads and the disk and the related test codes increases dramatically... the content inside those piece points is getting more intense, which also results in more absorption.

STX.claim: Seagate のニアライン向け HDD はリードタイム（ウェーハ調達からテストまで 13 週超）を要するため、主要 OEM・クラウド顧客は事前に Seagate 製品を資格認定（qualification）しなければならない。この qualification プロセスが実質的な切り替えコストを生む。
STX.evidence: Lead times on nearline are -- between wafer and test are well beyond 13 weeks... chasing big upsides on nearline and mission-critical is much more difficult.

STX.claim: Seagate は 6TB・8TB・Kinetic object-based storage platform の先行開発・顧客評価（qualification）で主要 OEM・クラウドプロバイダー全社との深い技術的関係を構築。FY2014 時点で 6TB は大多数の主要 OEM が qualification 済み、8TB の顧客開発ユニットを展開。
STX.evidence: In the enterprise market, most of our major OEMs and cloud customers have qualified or are actively qualifying our 6-terabyte product. This product has many industry-leading features... We have also delivered 8-terabyte customer development units to major customers and cloud service providers, and the initial customer feedback has been very positive.

STX.claim: Seagate は「exabyte 成長率が areal density 成長率を上回る」というテーゼに基づき、フラッシュへの完全移行ではなく HDD とフラッシュのハイブリッド共存モデルを採用。CSP/エンタープライズは flash を storage ではなく fast memory として使用しており、HDD の long-term structural need は揺るがないとの立場。
STX.evidence: There's no one that's using SSDs for storage. I mean, maybe at the margin for replacing boot drives... Most implementations of flash in a data center also have massive amounts of storage. And in fact, depending on what application you're running, the flash enabled you to actually need to control more storage.

STX.claim: Seagate は FY2014 で investment-grade 債券 $1.8B を調達し加重平均金利を 5% に低下、満期を 2025 年まで延長。低コスト資本構造により競合より有利な財務基盤を確立、R&D と M&A への投資能力を保持。
STX.evidence: Over the course of the fiscal year, we successfully raised $1.8 billion in investment-grade debt while retiring $700 million. These actions decreased our weighted average interest rate to 5% and extended our debt maturity profile out to 2025.

STX.claim: Seagate の hybrid drive は PC 大手 3 社（全主要 OEM）の主力製品ラインに採用され、FY2014 Q4 時点で 2.5 million 台/四半期の出荷を計画。HDD と SSD のハイブリッドという技術的差別化が大手 OEM との関係を強化している。
STX.evidence: The top 3 worldwide PC manufacturers now offer our hard drive in their mainstream product lines. We have seen a significant acceleration in demand and plan to ship over 2.5 million hybrid drives in the September quarter.

SUNP.claim: インド製薬市場における#1市場シェアポジション（約9%）と専門医クラス別処方シェア首位（12領域）を支える医師関係構築・ブランド力
SUNP.evidence: Q4 FY2015 CEO (Abhay Gandhi): 'Sun Pharma is now ranked #1 and holds approximately 9% market share in the INR 86,000 crores pharmaceutical market. Sun Pharma is ranked #1 based on share of prescriptions, with 12 classes of doctors: psychiatrists, neurologists, cardiologists, ophthalmologists, orthopedicians, nephrologists, gastroenterologists, diabetologists, urologists, dermatologists, chest physicians and consultant physicians.' Q4 FY2014: Ranked #2 with 5.4% share, #1 prescriptions in 7 specialist classes.

adjustments.reasoning: Q4 annual callでの言及（主・①相当）で調整なし
シェアは結果。背後の能力（MR力、製品差別化）の具体的説明が不足

kb1_evaluations.reasoning: #1シェアと12クラス処方シェアは「結果」。医師関係構築能力（MR力、製品差別化力）という「能力」の背後要因説明が不足。パターンA-T（結果→原因）に抵触
9%シェア（FY2014比+3.6pp）、12クラス別#1という定量データあり。競合（Cipla、Dr. Reddy's等）との比較は暗示的

9%シェア・12クラス別1位という定量データはある

SUNP.overall_reasoning: インド#1シェア・12クラス処方首位は明確な定量データだが、これらは結果（パターンA-T）。背後の能力（なぜ医師がSun Pharmaを好むか）の説明が不足。dogma.md ルール1（能力vs結果）観点から40%が妥当。定量データ（9%、12クラス）は部分的にパターンI-Tに合致するが競合との差別化の仕組みが乏しい

UPS.claim: UPS operates a global integrated logistics network delivering nearly 17 million packages per day (34 million on peak day) to 9.4 million customers, supported by 10 hyper-computing mainframe platforms processing 27 million instructions per second. This scale creates cost advantages that no new entrant or regional player can replicate, as incremental volume drives fixed cost leverage across an already-built network.
UPS.evidence: We do all that for 9.4 million customers a day. Needless to say, when you're delivering nearly 17 million packages a day and over 34 million on our peak day, well, the data has to be precise. (2014 Investor Conference, Dave Barnes); Global shipment growth of 7.2%, and driving revenue up 5.6% to a total $14.3 billion. (Q2 2014, Kurt Kuehn)

UPS.claim: ORION (On-Road Integrated Optimization and Navigation), UPS's proprietary route optimization system, represents a decade-long technology development effort that reduces driver miles and fuel consumption beyond what competitors can replicate. The system integrates advanced algorithms, telematics, and DIADs to optimize 45% of driver routes by end of 2014, with savings exceeding original projections.
UPS.evidence: This breakthrough routing technology represents a decade-long effort to develop tools that reduce miles driven and cut fuel consumption and improve the customer experience. Recognition like this is rewarding, but more importantly, the capabilities we receive from this technology puts UPS in a better position to respond to changing market dynamics. (Q2 2014, Scott Davis); ORION is built on a technology foundation supported by advanced algorithms that are custom developed, telematics, our drivers' mobile computing devices that we call DIADs. All of these technologies, together, optimize driver routes to increase efficiency and to reduce both miles and carbon footprint. We introduced ORION back in 2011... the results, they're exceeding our expectations. (2014 Investor Conference, Jack Levis); The reduction of just 1 mile each day per driver over the course of a year will save UPS $50 million. (2014 Investor Conference, Dave Barnes)

UPS.claim: UPS My Choice, with 11.4 million registered users growing at 100,000 new members per week (as of 2014), creates a consumer-facing network effect: more registered users make the network more valuable for retailers (better delivery preferences), which attracts more volume to UPS's network, creating a self-reinforcing cycle. Expanded to 15 countries in 2014.
UPS.evidence: UPS My Choice has more than 11.4 million registered users. And we're experiencing right now today growth at a pace of 100,000 new members per week. The success of My Choice here in the U.S. led us to extend the service last month to 15 additional countries. (2014 Investor Conference, Dave Barnes); Solutions have been implemented to provide better information on package location and shipment status, ultimately benefiting customers and UPS. (Q2 2014, David Abney)

UPS.claim: UPS's global integrated network creates a structural advantage in cross-border trade that competitors with fragmented regional networks cannot match. The integrated model enables door-to-door international delivery across 200+ countries with visibility at the shipment level, enabling complex supply chain outsourcing for healthcare, aerospace, and retail customers.
UPS.evidence: UPS has a legacy of change and transformation... We've reinvented ourselves many times over the past 107 years... We expanded the geographies that we serve, then the mode and, finally, the types of goods that move, all in the physical domain. (2014 Investor Conference, David Abney); Customers in health care and aerospace have outsourced much of their supply chain network to UPS so they can focus on their core business. (2014 Investor Conference, David Abney); Given how our network is so tightly integrated, I'm convinced our competitors will have a hard time offering customers this degree of collaboration and value. (2014 Investor Conference, David Abney)

UPS.claim: UPS's industry-specific supply chain solutions in healthcare (6.4 million sq ft of healthcare distribution space, temperature-controlled products, 36 medical device field stocking locations reaching 80% of US hospital beds within 4 hours) create deep integration with pharmaceutical and medical device customers that generate high switching costs.
UPS.evidence: Recently opened 36 health care compliant field stocking locations to reduce delivery time for medical device shipments. These sites will provide customers the ability to reach over 80% of U.S. hospital beds within 4 hours. (Q2 2014, David Abney); In the area of enhanced health care capabilities, such as introduction of UPS Temperature True Saver and UPS Proactive Response. In addition, we will add to our already 6.4 million square feet of health care distribution space with several openings planned worldwide in 2014. (Q4 2013, Scott Davis)

UPS.claim: UPS's data analytics platform, built over 60 years since 1954 when the second CEO pioneered operations research, enables prescriptive analytics that predict future network optimization needs. This accumulated data infrastructure ('tensors of thousands of servers, 10 hyper-computing mainframe platforms, 27 million instructions per second') provides a structural advantage in network optimization that competitors cannot quickly replicate.
UPS.evidence: UPS began laying the foundation for a data-driven network long before people considered data big. 60 years ago, George Smith, our company's second CEO, praised the benefits of extensive data collection and the application of data analysis... 'The ability to make decisions is the power to manage. Without operations research, we could only analyze our problems intuitively.' (2014 Investor Conference, Dave Barnes); We have moved from using descriptive analytics, which simply evaluate the past, to prescriptive analytics that are quite capable of predicting the future. (2014 Investor Conference, Dave Barnes)

UPS.claim: UPS's dim weight pricing expansion ensures proper compensation for network consumption of large, lightweight packages (particularly e-commerce shipments). This pricing strategy - charging for dimensional volume rather than just weight - was designed to improve revenue management in B2C and force customers to more accurately represent actual network capacity consumption.
UPS.evidence: The expansion of dim weight pricing is a change we are making to ensure UPS is properly compensated for network consumption. (Q2 2014, Scott Davis); Our tactics of creating value for customers, along with the revenue management associated with the GRI dim weight and other value-added accessorials are all working. And we're obviously very, very pleased with the yield. (Q2 2015, Alan Gershenhorn)

UPS.claim: UPS's international export volume growth (9.1% Q4 2013, Europe up 13%, 5.5% in Q2 2015) driven by e-commerce acceleration and global trade expansion provides a structural growth tailwind. Management projects continued double-digit international operating profit growth as global trade agreements (TPP, TTIP) are enacted.
UPS.evidence: Export daily volume jumped 9.5%, the largest year-over-year gain we have seen in some time. (Q4 2013, Kurt Kuehn); International export volume growth that remains strong at 5.5% growth, driven by an intra-Europe shipment growth of over 8.5%. (Q2 2015, Richard Peretz); We can be on the cusp of a Renaissance in trade with a boom in exports all supported by these global networks. (2014 Investor Conference, David Abney)

USB.claim: U.S. Bancorpは2013年通期でROA 1.65%・ROE 15.8%・効率比率52.4%、2014年通期でROA 1.54%・ROE 14.7%・効率比率53.2%という業界最高水準の収益性指標を一貫して維持しており、これを「consistent, predictable, repeatable results」として明示している。
USB.evidence: We achieved industry-leading profitability, with a return on average assets of 1.65%, a return on average common equity of 15.8% and an efficiency ratio of 52.4%. [...] U.S. Bank's performance metrics continue to do best-in-class. We are focused on the future, building our company to perform as we have in the past, producing consistent, predictable, repeatable results.

USB.claim: U.S. Bancorpは2013年純利益$5.8B・2014年純利益$5.9B（各年記録更新）を達成し、Basel III Tier 1普通株式比率9.0%（基準7%を大幅超過）という強固な資本基盤を維持しながら、収益の71-72%を株主に還元している。
USB.evidence: U.S. Bancorp reported record net income of $5.8 billion for the full year of 2013, or $3 per diluted common share. [...] U.S. Bank reported record net income of $5.9 billion for the full year of 2014 or $3.08 per diluted common share. [...] we returned $4 billion, or 71%, of our 2013 earnings to our shareholders in the form of dividends and buybacks. [...] we returned $4 billion or 72% of our 2014 earnings to the shareholders.

USB.claim: U.S. Bancorpは小売決済・マーチャントプロセッシング・トラスト・投資管理・財務管理・投資商品といった多様な手数料ビジネスを持ち、これらの複合的なサービス関係が企業・個人顧客のスイッチングコストを高めている。
USB.evidence: We saw growth in retail and corporate payments, merchant processing, trust and investment management fees, deposit service charge, treasury management fees and investment product fees. [...] we added a small municipal bond trustee business in March, strengthening our position as the #1 provider of municipal trustee and agency services in the United States.

USB.claim: U.S. Bancorpは「他の銀行より速い貸出成長を目指さない」姿勢を明示し、信用品質を最優先にする慎重な成長戦略をとっており、高成長を求める競合の「市場シェア拡大→信用損失増加」サイクルとは対照的な経営モデルを維持している。
USB.evidence: we are not going to be dissuaded by people who want to compare us to those who are growing loans faster on a given quarter [...] we never have been impacted by that. [...] we're not managing to that point. We're managing to high-quality loan portfolio. I think our quality of charge-offs and nonperforming assets will prove that. [...] tempting as it might be to tell you guys, we're going to move to 1.5% to 2% linked quarter or 8% to 10% year-over-year, the economy doesn't warrant that yet.

USB.claim: U.S. Bancorpは過去10年以上、信用損失が低い状態を維持しており、2013年Q4の貸出損失率0.53%・2014年Q4の貸出損失率0.50%という業界最低水準を維持しつつ、不良資産が継続して減少している（2013年比11.2%減、2014年Q4対比6%減）。
USB.evidence: Credit quality remains strong. Total net charge-offs decreased by 8.3% from the prior quarter, while total nonperforming assets declined 6% on a linked-quarter basis. The ratio of net charge-offs to average loans outstanding was 0.50% in the fourth quarter. [...] Total net charge-offs in the fourth quarter decreased by $16 million, or 4.9% from the third quarter of 2013 [...] The ratio of net charge-offs to average loans outstanding in the fourth quarter declined to 0.53% from 0.57%.

USB.claim: U.S. BancorpはRBSシチズンズのシカゴ支店フランチャイズ買収（2014年初）により市場シェアをほぼ倍増させ、地場市場での顧客関係・店舗ネットワークのスイッチングコストをさらに強化している。
USB.evidence: we began the new year with an announcement of the purchase of a Chicago branch franchise owned by RBS Citizens Financial Group. This investment will nearly double our market share in this great market within our footprint, strengthening our position and adding products, services and convenience for new and existing customers.

USB.claim: U.S. Bancorpの従業員エンゲージメントは過去最高水準にあり、CEO Davis は「engaged employees do more with whatever assets they are given」と述べ、人材・文化的優位性が業績の基盤であることを明示している。
USB.evidence: Our employee engagement is at record levels, which I think informs -- employees that are engaged are intensely the nth degree here, where they can do more with whatever assets they are given and they'll continue to do it if they believe the company's future is strong and that they're part of it.

USB.claim: U.S. Bancorpは地方自治体信託・代理人サービスで全米第1位のポジションを持ち、アイルランドのクインティリオン（ヘッジファンド管理）買収により代替投資サービスのヨーロッパネットワークを拡大している。
USB.evidence: we added a small municipal bond trustee business in March, strengthening our position as the #1 provider of municipal trustee and agency services in the United States. And in November, we announced the acquisition of Quintillion Limited, an Ireland-based full service hedge fund administrator, further expanding our alternative investment servicing network in Europe.

USB.claim: U.S. BancorpはChartered Account Advance（短期小額預金融資）廃止等、短期収益よりも規制・信用リスク管理を優先する判断を積み重ねており、これが長期的な効率比率（低50%台）維持に貢献している。
USB.evidence: Lower loan fees were due to the previously communicated wind down of Checking Account Advance, our short-term, small dollar deposit advanced product. [...] Our efficiency ratio for the fourth quarter was 54.3%, lower than the prior year. Excluding the impact of notable items in the fourth quarter, our efficiency ratio was 53.8%. We expect this ratio will remain in the low 50s going forward.

USB.claim: U.S. Bancorpは2014年に高6%-低7%の貸出成長率を目標として設定し、「economy slowly improves」に伴って市場シェアをさらに拡大できるポジションを主張している。
USB.evidence: for the year, you look back and we are just short of 6% year-over-year loan growth, and we're projecting a higher number for 2015, slightly higher in the high-6%, low-7%. So if we are accurate, and we usually are, then we see that as a small, but steady, continued improvement in loan growth. [...] we'll continue to grow market share, we'll continue to do well.

USB.claim: U.S. BancorpのCEO Davisは「コンプライアンス・運営健全性・監査」に自らが注力し、CFOのCecereを事業部門責任者に昇進させるという経営構造を採用しており、規制強化環境下での内部統制重視モデルが長期的な競争優位の源泉となっている。
USB.evidence: I'll continue to be running the whole company, but focused especially on the support teams and the compliance and the operating integrity that has gotten this company to this point so far. [...] We'll add to compliance operating risk areas, audit areas, where we think we continue to need to make sure we're at the right level of support.

UTHR.claim: PAH（肺動脈性肺高血圧症）における複数投与経路トレプロスチニル製品ポートフォリオ（皮下/静注Remodulin・吸入Tyvaso・経口Orenitram）
UTHR.evidence: Q4 CEO発言（Martine Rothblatt）: 'it took only about half that amount of time, approximately 5 years, for Tyvaso to reach approximately $0.5 billion a year in sales... it's taken just about half a year for Orenitram to reach somewhere between a sixth and a fifth of the level of sales of those other products.' Q4: 'Orenitram exceeded 25% of Adcirca sales and 17% of Tyvaso sales despite the fact that December was only the seventh month of Orenitram's launch.' Q3 Roger Jeffs: 'Approximately 70% of starts in Q3 were from patients new to prostacyclin therapy, with approximately 20% being transitions from Tyvaso and approximately 10% transitioning from Remodulin.'

UTHR.claim: PAH患者の高い療法継続性（Remodulin平均26か月、Tyvaso平均20か月）と収益の耐久性
UTHR.evidence: Q3 Roger Jeffs発言（Q&A）: 'If you look at Remodulin, for example, it's 26 months. If you look at Tyvaso, the average duration of therapy is 20 months... from our open-label clinical trial experience, the duration of therapy was around 28 months or more... our expectation is because the therapy's starting earlier in the treatment algorithm, the patients will actually persist longer on Orenitram.' Q4 CEO発言: 'revenues first quarter, second quarter, third quarter, fourth quarter, there were growth in revenues every sequential quarter... we haven't seen that in our entire 10-year history.'

UTHR.claim: Orenitramの経口プロスタサイクリン療法による未治療患者市場（30,000人中7,000人のみ治療）へのアクセス拡大能力
UTHR.evidence: Q4 CEO発言: 'there are 30,000 and growing numbers of pulmonary hypertension patients. The number of those patients in the U.S who are on our products currently are something in like the 7,000 patient range. WAB.claim: Wabtecのアフターマーケット事業（売上の約60%、$1.9B）は、鉄道OEMや鉄道会社による部品・システムのリプレース需要に基づいており、一度導入されたブレーキ・信号システムはメンテナンス契約・交換部品需要が継続する高スイッチングコスト構造を持つ。PTC（Positive Train Control）システムもインストール後のサービス収入が長期にわたる。
WAB.evidence: our overall aftermarket sales were almost $1.9 billion, about 60% of our total sales. (Q4 2014 prepared remarks); the aftermarket really doesn't start till the warranty period finishes. So warranty is normally a year on these contracts... We look for annual annuities of about anywhere from 5% to 10% depending on the volume. (Q4 2014 Q&A)

WAB.claim: Wabtec Performance System（WPS）は、継続的改善・コスト削減・キャッシュ生成を体系化したオペレーション管理システムであり、2014年にキャッシュフローが純利益を$120M上回る高い変換率（472M vs 352M）を実現した。14年連続株価上昇という実績がこの運営能力を裏付ける。
WAB.evidence: cash flow from operations of $472 million for the year, exceeding net income by $120 million. (Q4 2014 prepared remarks); Wabtec finished 2014 as the only company in North America on any exchange whose year-end stock price has increased for 14 consecutive years. (Q4 2014 prepared remarks); the power of our Wabtec Performance System. (Q4 2014 prepared remarks)

WAB.claim: WabtecはECP（電子制御空気ブレーキ）技術を保有し、世界40,000台超の導入実績がある唯一かつ最大のサプライヤーの一角である。米国でのFRA規制義務化（2015年中に発表予定）により、潜在的に数十万台の米国タンク車・機関車への展開が義務付けられる可能性がある。
WAB.evidence: globally, there's installations of well over 40,000 cars that have ECP braking on it. Most of those cars are in Australia, some in the Middle East and South Africa. (Q4 2014 Q&A); our major competitor in braking is Knorr New York Air Brake, and they have the technology as well. (Q4 2014 Q&A); New rules from the Federal Railway Administration under consideration could require ECP on certain tank cars. The new rules are expected to be announced sometime around June. (Q4 2014 prepared remarks)

WAB.claim: Wabtecは14年連続の積極的M&A戦略（Fandstan、Dia-Frag等）とオーガニック成長により、グローバル売上の50%を海外（$1.5B）に拡大。規模の拡大と多様化ビジネスモデルが競合に対する優位性を生んでいる。
WAB.evidence: sales outside the U.S. were about $1.5 billion, half of our total sales versus about 1/3 of our total sales 5 years ago. (Q4 2014 prepared remarks); Revenues increased 19% to a record $3 billion. (Q4 2014 prepared remarks)

WAB.claim: 全世界の鉄道インフラ市場（$100B超、年3%成長）は都市化・環境規制・安全規制によって長期成長が確実であり、Wabtecの鉄道部品・信号・PTC事業は業界成長を上回る成長率が期待できる。

The global installed base for Freight cars is more than 5 million, with about 75% of those vehicles outside of NAFTA. (Q4 2014 prepared remarks)

WAB.claim: 2014年実績: 売上$3.0B（+19%）、EPS $3.62（+20%）、CF from Operations $472M（純利益$352Mを$120M超過）、バックログ$2.3B（過去最高）。2015年ガイダンス: EPS $4.05（+12%）、売上+10%。
WAB.evidence: Revenues increased 19% to a record $3 billion. EPS increased 20% to a record $3.62, and our backlog ended the year at a record $2.3 billion. (Q4 2014 prepared remarks)

WAT.evidence: FY2014記録的フリーキャッシュフロー。Adj非GAAPのEPS+9%（$5.04→$5.47）。ROI industry-leadingと主張（具体数値は開示なし）

WDC.claim: Western Digital の HelioSeal 密閉型ヘリウム HDD プラットフォームは、製造プロセス上の優位性（7プラッター高密度封入・消費電力23%削減）を有しており、1百万台超の出荷実績がある。競合他社が追随困難な累積技術・プロセス知識を具体的な製品優位性として実証している。
WDC.evidence: We surpassed 1 million Helium hard drive deployments and are now ramping our new 8-terabyte PMR Helium sealed drives. (Q3 FY2015 prepared remarks); We saw strong demand for our high-capacity Helium and 15K RPM 2.5-inch performance hard drives. (Q4 FY2015 prepared remarks)

WDC.claim: HGST買収後のWD/HGSTデュアルブランド体制は、HDD業界の2大プレーヤーの一角として、MOFCOM規制下でも規模の経済から生じるコスト優位性（MOFCOM解除後のOpEx $400M/年+COGS削減）を潜在的に保有する。
WDC.evidence: synergies in OpEx will be in the range of $400 million a year and that COGS synergies will be material and on top of that number. (Q4 FY2015 Q&A); we expect that, from an operating expense perspective, that we would realize approximately $100 million of OpEx savings a quarter. (Q3 FY2015 Q&A)

WDC.claim: Enterprise SSD分野でWDは、SAS SSD製品の顧客受け入れにより前年比2倍超の$244Mへ成長させた。エンタープライズ顧客向けのSASとNVMe両対応製品ポートフォリオが競合との差別化要因となっている。
WDC.evidence: Our Enterprise SSD revenue more than doubled year-over-year to $244 million, demonstrating the continued success and broadening customer acceptance of our leading SAS SSD products. (Q4 FY2015 prepared remarks); We expanded our footprint in the enterprise SSD space with the initial ramp of our new Ultrastar PCIe and VME offering. It has been qualified with several leading customers. (Q4 FY2015 prepared remarks); Enterprise SSD business was accretive for the quarter and grew revenues by 67% year-over-year to $224 million. (Q3 FY2015 prepared remarks)

WDC.claim: WDはActive Archive Systemという新カテゴリ（市場規模$15B）を創設し、従来のテープ/クラウドストレージの代替となる高付加価値アーカイブストレージ製品を展開。Amplidata買収でソフトウェアスタックを強化した垂直統合戦略は、純HDD競合には模倣困難。
WDC.evidence: We shipped our first Active Archive system, a new category of high-value-added archival storage product addressing a market of approximately $15 billion. (Q3 FY2015 prepared remarks); We completed the acquisition of Amplidata, a key building block of our vertical innovation strategy for Active Archive systems. (Q3 FY2015 prepared remarks); We continue to see positive market reaction to the value proposition of our new Active Archive system. (Q4 FY2015 prepared remarks)

WDC.claim: WDはデータ成長（クラウド・モビリティ主導）によるエクサバイト出荷増加トレンドを確認しており、非PC系（エンタープライズ・サーベイランス・クラウド）事業比率の拡大が中期的な収益性改善ドライバーとなる。
WDC.evidence: Our view of persistent data growth remains intact, driven by mobility and the cloud. (Q4 FY2015 prepared remarks); Revenue from our video surveillance hard drives continued its rapid growth as we expanded our lineup of these purpose-built solutions. (Q4 FY2015 prepared remarks)

WDC.claim: Q4 FY2015（2015年6月期）: 売上$3.2B、Non-GAAP粗利率29.8%、EPS $1.51。期末現金$5.0B。Enterprise SSD $244M（前年比2倍超）。56エクサバイト出荷（前年比+2%）。
WDC.evidence: We reported revenues of $3.2 billion, non-GAAP gross margins of 29.8% and diluted earnings per share of $1.51. (Q4 FY2015 prepared remarks); Our Enterprise SSD revenue more than doubled year-over-year to $244 million. (Q4 FY2015 prepared remarks); Our storage shipments for the June quarter were 56 exabytes, up 2% year-over-year. (Q4 FY2015 prepared remarks)

WFC.claim: Cross-Sell Model: 6.16 Products Per Household — Structural Revenue Per Customer Advantage
WFC.evidence: Retail Banking cross-sell: 6.16 products/household (record, Q4 2013, up from 6.05 YoY). Wholesale Banking: 7.1 products. WBR: 10.42 products. 16 consecutive quarters of EPS growth.

adjustments.reasoning: 業界最高水準のクロスセル比率

kb1_evaluations.reasoning: 6.16 products/household（記録）、Wholesale 7.1、WBR 10.42という三層の定量データ。YoY比較もあり
銀行業界でのクロスセルは各商品が顧客ロックインを強化する構造。製品数増加がスイッチングコスト上昇と相関

kb2_patterns.reasoning: 6.16 products/householdは米国主要銀行で開示される最高水準のクロスセル比率。定量的差別化パターンI該当

WFC.overall_reasoning: 6.16 products/householdは米国大手銀行中最高水準のクロスセル比率。三層（Retail/Wholesale/WBR）での高水準維持は構造的販売文化の証拠。各製品がスイッチングコストを積み上げる銀行業界の構造と合致。JPMorgan・Citiとの直接比較がない点で70%

WFC.claim: Deposit Franchise Scale — $1.1 Trillion at 9bp Cost, 13 Consecutive Quarters of Deposit Growth
WFC.evidence: Average deposits: $1.1T (Q4 2014, +$22.7B sequentially). Deposit cost: 9 basis points. 13 consecutive quarters of deposit growth + declining costs. Primary consumer checking +5.2% YoY.

adjustments.reasoning: 市場構造と低コスト預金基盤の合致

kb1_evaluations.reasoning: 9bp預金コスト（業界最低水準）、13四半期連続成長、$1.1T規模という多層の定量データ
銀行業界では預金コストが低いほど金利環境での利鞘優位が構造的に高まる

kb2_patterns.reasoning: 米国小売銀行業界での支店密度・顧客信頼・デジタル基盤がfunding cost優位を生む市場構造とWFCの$1.1T+9bp預金の合致。高評価パターンIV

WFC.overall_reasoning: 9bp預金コストは米国主要銀行中最低水準。13四半期連続で預金増加+コスト低下という定量的優位は明確。Branch density・顧客信頼・クロスセルによる構造的な低コスト預金基盤。Bank of America・Citiとの比較でも優位。70%

WFC.claim: 90+ Business Line Diversification — Structural Revenue Stability Across Rate Cycles
WFC.evidence: 90+ businesses across Consumer/Commercial/Wealth/Mortgage/International. 2013: Mortgage refi declined $3.4B; offset by double-digit growth in brokerage, IB, cards, servicing. 16 consecutive EPS growth quarters.

adjustments.reasoning: 実証された収益補完の定量的証拠

kb1_evaluations.reasoning: 90+事業ラインによる収益分散は構造的（補完的ではない）。Wachovia合併統合で獲得した恒久的特性
銀行業界では金利サイクルごとに有利な事業が変わる。90+事業は各サイクルでの収益補完が機能

kb2_patterns.reasoning: Mortgage $3.4B減少をBrokerage/IB/Cards/Servicingで相殺し16四半期連続EPS成長という定量的証拠

WFC.overall_reasoning: 90+事業ラインでの実証された収益補完（Mortgage下落→IB/Cards/WBR上昇）は構造的優位。16四半期のEPS継続成長がその有効性を実証。JPMorgan・Bank of Americaより多様化した事業構造はWachovia統合の恒久的成果。70%

WFC.claim: Mortgage Market Scale — $50B+ Quarterly Origination, #1 US Mortgage Lender
WFC.evidence: Q4 2013 originations: $50B (down from $80B Q3). Refi share: 32% (from 65%). Retail fulfillment FTEs reduced ~50% from peak while maintaining market leadership.

adjustments.reasoning: 市場規模は結果指標

kb1_evaluations.reasoning: モーゲージ起源高量は市場シェアという結果（ルール1）。起源能力そのものの説明が不足
JPMorgan Chase・Bank of Americaも主要モーゲージ起源銀行

kb2_patterns.reasoning: $50B起源量は市場シェアという結果の指標。モーゲージは価格競争的な市場でStructural Moatが薄い

WFC.overall_reasoning: #1モーゲージ起源銀行は事実だが、モーゲージは価格競争的市場でサービス差別化が困難。デジタルチャネルの台頭により支店密度優位が縮小する可能性。50%

WFC.claim: Primary Checking Customer Growth — 5.2% Annual Growth, 42% Credit Card Penetration
WFC.evidence: Primary consumer checking +5.2% YoY (highest since 2010). Credit card penetration: 42% (up from 37%). Card purchase volume +17%. New credit accounts +29%.

kb1_evaluations.reasoning: 5.2%成長（10年来最高）、42%クレジットカード浸透率という定量データ
プライマリーチェッキングは優位性の源泉だが、デジタルバンク（Chime、SoFi）の参入でスイッチングコストが低下しつつある

kb2_patterns.reasoning: 5.2%成長・42%クレカ浸透率は定量的。ただし競合比較なし

WFC.overall_reasoning: プライマリーチェッキングは銀行関係の入口製品であり、5.2%成長と42%クレカ浸透率は構造的顧客深化を示す。ただしデジタルバンクの台頭でスイッチングコスト低下のリスクあり。50%

WFC.claim: 55-59% Efficiency Ratio Target — Outperforming Peer Banks
WFC.evidence: Q4 2013 efficiency ratio: 58.5% (down 62bp). FY2014: 58.1%. Management: 'Even at the upper end of our target range, we are operating more efficiently than many of our peers.'

adjustments.reasoning: 効率比率は結果指標

kb1_evaluations.reasoning: JPMorgan Chaseも55-60%の効率比率範囲内で運営
効率比率目標の設定は経営施策であり構造的優位ではない（ルール8）

kb2_patterns.reasoning: 効率比率は経営効率の結果指標。優位性の源泉ではない（結果→原因の転倒）

WFC.overall_reasoning: 58%台の効率比率は優れた経営効率だが、JPMorgan等の競合も同様の水準を達成しており差別化にならない。また効率比率は経営施策の結果であり競争優位の源泉ではない（ルール8）。30%

WFC.claim: Core Loan Portfolio Growth: 14 Consecutive Quarters YoY Growth. FY2014: +$60B (+8%)

kb1_evaluations.reasoning: ローン成長→利息収益増→EPS成長の直接的メカニズム。14四半期の継続実績で検証可能

WFC.overall_reasoning: 14四半期継続のローン成長は定量的に明確かつ直接的なNII成長経路。クロスセルモデルと低コスト預金基盤が支援。70%

WFC.claim: WBR Client Assets: $1.6T (Q4 2013, +11%), Brokerage Advisory Assets $423B (+13%)
WFC.evidence: WBR client assets: $1.6T (Q4 2013, +11%). Brokerage advisory: $423B (+13%). Wealth management loans +13% YoY (6th consecutive double-digit quarter). Asset-based fees +12%.

kb1_evaluations.reasoning: AUM成長→資産ベースフィー増加の直接的メカニズム。+12%フィー成長で検証可能

WFC.overall_reasoning: WBRのAUM+11%・アドバイザリー資産+13%・フィー+12%は直接的なフィー収益成長接続。継続的な正味フロー（new business）が構造的成長を示す。70%

WFM.claim: Whole Foods Marketブランドは「高品質・自然・オーガニック食品」のカテゴリ認知において米国最強のポジションを持ち、顧客の価値観に訴えるブランド訴求力がプレミアム価格設定を可能にしている。売上/GSF $990（業界最高水準）という生産性指標がブランド力を実証している。
WFM.evidence: The Whole Foods Market brand has helped lead the shift in consciousness towards fresh, healthy foods. (Q3 FY2015 prepared remarks); industry-leading sales per gross square foot of $990 (Q3 FY2015 prepared remarks); Our new store class for the last 8 quarters has averaged 38 stores, with sales per gross square foot of approximately $700, translating to productivity levels of 78% on a weighted square footage basis. (Q3 FY2015 prepared remarks)

WFM.claim: Whole Foods Marketは422店舗（16M SF）の規模を活かした調達力・バイヤーネットワークを持ち、長期的な1,200店舗ポテンシャルと2形態展開（365 by WFM）による成長余地がある。既存の物流・品質基準インフラの活用が新店の効率的立ち上げを支える。
WFM.evidence: With 424 stores totaling more than 16 million square feet today, we expect to cross the 500-store mark in fiscal year 2017, and over the longer term, continue to see potential for 1,200 Whole Foods Market stores in the United States. (Q3 FY2015 prepared remarks); Comparable stores less than 2 years old have averaged 15% comps and most importantly, a 13% return on invested capital well in excess of our weighted average cost of capital. (Q3 FY2015 prepared remarks)

WFM.claim: Whole Foods Marketは業界初の「365 by Whole Foods Market」という低価格・高効率の第2フォーマットを展開（シルバーレイク等5店舗リース確定）。これは既存スーパーには「自分たちのブランドが傷つく」ため模倣困難なポジショニングを可能にする。
WFM.evidence: we are introducing a second format, 365 by Whole Foods Market, which we believe expands our growth opportunity beyond the 1,200 stores. (Q3 FY2015 prepared remarks); When we project this out, if we get anything close to what Whole Foods Market sales per square foot are in our new stores, the 365 stores are going to be incredibly profitable and with very high ROICs, even with reduced gross margins. (Q3 FY2015 Q&A)

WFM.claim: 「健康食品・オーガニック食品への意識向上」という長期的消費トレンドがWFMの成長基盤。ただしコンバンション食品大手（Kroger, Costco）のオーガニック参入が競合激化を引き起こしており、WFMの高価格プレミアムへの圧力が高まっている。
WFM.evidence: The Whole Foods Market brand has helped lead the shift in consciousness towards fresh, healthy foods. (Q3 FY2015 prepared remarks); in this retail marketplace, which is more dynamic and competitive than ever (Q3 FY2015 prepared remarks)

WFM.claim: Q3 FY2015（2015年7月期）: 売上$3.6B（+7%）、調整コンプ+2.2%（Easter調整後）、NYC問題後最後の2週間はコンプ+0.4%に急落。EBITDA margin 9.7%、ROIC 15%、CF from Operations $287M。2015通期: 売上+9%、コンプ低一桁、EBITDA margin約9%、ROIC>14%。
WFM.evidence: quarterly sales grew $255 million to a record $3.6 billion... comparable store sales increased 2.2% for the quarter (Q3 FY2015 prepared remarks); we delivered 9.7% EBITDA margin, $287 million of operating cash flow and a 15% return on invested capital. (Q3 FY2015 prepared remarks)

WMT.claim: 11,000店舗以上のグローバル物理ネットワークとデジタル・eコマース能力の統合による独自のオムニチャネル基盤
WMT.evidence: Q4 Prepared Remarks (CEO Doug McMillon): 'We have an advantage at Walmart by combining our store and distribution network with our e-commerce capabilities to allow our customers to interact with our brand in ways that are most convenient for them.' / 'We're leveraging technology to strengthen our e-commerce and mobile capabilities and integrating these digital assets with our more than 11,000 stores globally.'

WMT.evidence: 物理店舗ネットワーク×デジタル統合 → 既存店売上+eコマース成長 → CAGR維持

WMT.claim: Every Day Low Price（EDLP）の持続的な価格リーダーシップポジション
WMT.evidence: Q4 Prepared Remarks (CEO): 'Being the low-price leader has been a part of our customer proposition, and it will continue to be a priority in the future.' / 'Value matters to everyone regardless of household income level, and digital access creates even more price transparency.'

WMT.claim: EDLP価格リーダーシップ → 価格感応度の高い消費者獲得 → トラフィック維持・既存店売上成長
WMT.evidence: EDLP価格リーダーシップ → 価格感応度の高い消費者獲得 → トラフィック維持・既存店売上成長

WMT.claim: グローバル調達ネットワークとベンダー交渉力による低コスト仕入れ能力
WMT.evidence: Q4 International Prepared Remarks (Dave Cheesewright): 'We remain focused on saving our customers money by expanding our private label offering, improving product sourcing and driving costs out of our operations so that we can invest it back into price.' / Q4 China section: 'The We Operate for Less and the We Buy for Less programs in China have saved over $150 million over the course of the year.'

WMT.claim: 調達コスト削減 → 価格投資原資確保 → 価格競争力維持 → CAGR支援
WMT.evidence: 調達コスト削減 → 価格投資原資確保 → 価格競争力維持 → CAGR支援

WMT.evidence: Q4 Prepared Remarks (Greg Foran): 'Our traditional Neighborhood Markets delivered approximately a 7.7% comp for the quarter.' / 'By continuing to drive this format, we're able to offer customers easy and convenient access to fresh foods, pharmacy and services at Walmart's Every Day Low Price guarantee.'

WMT.claim: Neighborhood Market出店拡大（年間180-200店舗）→ 新規出店寄与でCAGR+1-2%
WMT.evidence: Neighborhood Market出店拡大（年間180-200店舗）→ 新規出店寄与でCAGR+1-2%

WMT.claim: China の We Operate for Less + We Buy for Less プログラムで年間$150M以上のコスト節約
WMT.evidence: China の We Operate for Less + We Buy for Less プログラムで年間$150M以上のコスト節約

WMT.claim: Q4 FY2015 Walmart U.S. Neighborhood Market（traditional）の四半期comps +7.7%。全フォーマットでは+1.5%
WMT.evidence: Q4 FY2015 Walmart U.S. Neighborhood Market（traditional）の四半期comps +7.7%。全フォーマットでは+1.5%

WMT.evidence: Q4 Prepared Remarks (Roz Brewer): 'Our investments in membership value initiatives enabled us to grow our membership income by over 8% this quarter. Our Plus penetration is at historic highs as Plus members are seeing the benefits from our Cash Rewards program.' / 'Sam's Club had a solid year, with membership income up over 10%.'

WMT.claim: Sam's Club会員収入FY2015全年+10.3%成長。Q4単独+8%成長。Plus会員比率が過去最高水準
WMT.evidence: Sam's Club会員収入FY2015全年+10.3%成長。Q4単独+8%成長。Plus会員比率が過去最高水準

WMT.claim: グローバルeコマース事業（Pangaea技術プラットフォーム）への大規模投資による次世代フルフィルメント能力
WMT.evidence: Q4 Prepared Remarks (Neil Ashe): 'Starting with our global technology platform. I refer to this as the operating system for commerce because it is the foundation for serving customers digitally and enables the integration of digital and physical commerce.' / 'Pangaea hummed along all day, serving our customers at record volume.'

WOW.claim: WoolworthsはオーストラリアのFresh Food（生鮮食品）市場においてGrocery（加工食品）を上回る市場シェア成長を実現する生鮮食品調達・鮮度管理能力を有する。
WOW.evidence: Tjeerd Jegen (FY2014 prepared_remarks): 'our fresh market share is now growing faster than our grocery share, Nielsen in the final quarter of calendar year 2013, we've been the fastest-growing retailer in fresh food.' '3% comp growth in FY14 - Fresh again outstripped our growth in grocery, which is great for mix.' 97%のオーストラリア産青果物調達、Simplot契約で$17M投資し国産冷凍野菜に切り替え。

adjustments: rule07: Coles（純粋競合）との生鮮食品調達能力の定量比較なし。市場シェア成長率の差異も示されていない
rule11: オーストラリアスーパーマーケット市場（Coles/Woolworths寡占）での生鮮差別化は市場構造と合致
rule04: Nielsen調査での最速成長という定量データあり。97%国産調達という数値あり

power_classification.benefit: 生鮮食品の市場シェア成長がGrocery比で高く、粗利ミックス改善と顧客ロイヤルティ向上に寄与
power_classification.barrier: 長年のサプライヤーネットワーク構築（97%国産、農家直接調達）は短期模倣困難

evidence_sources.speaker: Tjeerd Jegen
evidence_sources.quote: our fresh market share is now growing faster than our grocery share, and as mentioned by Nielsen in the final quarter of the calendar year 2013, we've been the fastest-growing retailer in fresh food

WOW.claim: WoolworthsのEveryday Rewardsロイヤルティプログラムと顧客データ分析（Quantiumとの提携）は、個人化されたオファー（週220万件）を通じて顧客粘着性を高める能力を有する。
WOW.evidence: Tjeerd Jegen (FY2014 prepared_remarks): 'we do about 2.2 million of those personalized offers every single week with our core customer group.' 'Everyday Rewards cards...10% up for those who have swiped.' Grant O'Brien: 'loyalty membership is now hitting 7.5 million in Onecard members.' Quantiumとの提携によるベンダーへのインサイト提供も進行中。

adjustments: rule07: Coles（Flybuys）との会員数・個人化能力の定量比較なし
rule06: データ分析によるロイヤルティは構造的優位性として評価可能
rule04: 750万会員、週220万件個人化オファーという定量数値あり

power_classification.benefit: 750万会員のデータネットワーク効果：会員増加→データ精度向上→個人化精度向上→粘着性向上の正のフィードバック
power_classification.barrier: QuantiumとのデータJVと750万会員の蓄積データは数年かけて構築されたもの

evidence_sources.speaker: Tjeerd Jegen
evidence_sources.quote: we do about 2.2 million of those personalized offers every single week with our core customer group

WOW.claim: Woolworthsのオンラインスーパーマーケットはオーストラリアの食料品・酒類・ニュージーランドスーパーマーケットのオンライン首位を獲得し、多チャネル統合（Click&Collect、専用フルフィルメントセンター）による差別化を実現している。
WOW.evidence: Grant O'Brien (FY2014 prepared_remarks): 'Woolworths Group has Australia's leading online food business, Australia's leading online liquor business, and New Zealand's leading online food business. online sales, which was an increase of 50% on the previous years.' 専用フルフィルメントセンター（Mascot）開設。GPSトラッキング配達追跡でコールセンター問い合わせ大幅削減。Click&Collect全国展開。

adjustments: rule08: オンライン展開は戦略的意思決定の側面が強い
rule07: Colesのオンラインとの比較なし
rule04: 50%成長、40%成長という数値あり。ただし絶対規模の競合比較なし

power_classification.benefit: オンライン購入習慣化と店舗受取（Click&Collect）のネットワーク拡大により顧客のスイッチングコストを増大
power_classification.barrier: 専用フルフィルメントインフラと全国Click&Collectネットワークの構築は資本集約的

evidence_sources.speaker: Grant O'Brien
evidence_sources.quote: Woolworths Group has Australia's leading online food business, Australia's leading online liquor business, and New Zealand's leading online food business as well as being Australasia's leading apparel business

WOW.claim: WoolworthsのMercury Supply Chain（Mercury II）は全事業（食品・酒類・非食品）にわたる在庫最適化・補充・物流技術の構造的インフラ優位性を形成する。
WOW.evidence: Grant O'Brien (FY2014 prepared_remarks): 'The supply chain for us has been a source of competitive advantage, driven off the platform that was Mercury I. Mercury II is now alive and well...It's right across the business. It includes the nonfood general merchandise aspects...logistics, replenishment and technology.' CODB: 6 basis points down, flat in Food & Liquor - cost improvement realized.

adjustments: rule07: Colesの物流システムとの比較なし
rule06: Mercury IIは構造的インフラ投資（模倣困難）として評価
大規模スーパーマーケットにとってサプライチェーン優位性は市場構造と合致（ルール11）

power_classification.benefit: 全事業統合による補充・在庫最適化でCODBを削減。規模効果で小規模競合が実現困難な在庫回転を達成
power_classification.barrier: Mercury II（前システムMercury Iを含む）は数年間の開発投資と全国展開インフラ

evidence_sources.speaker: Grant O'Brien
evidence_sources.quote: The supply chain for us has been a source of competitive advantage, driven off the platform that was Mercury I. Mercury II is now alive and well and starting to deliver within the Woolworths business but not this time confined to Food.

WOW.claim: WoolworthsのKirkland相当のプライベートブランド（Woolworths Gold, Select, Own Brand）は、NBと競合しながら粗利ミックス改善と顧客粘着性を実現する複層的ブランド構造を持つ。
WOW.evidence: Tjeerd Jegen (H1 2014 prepared_remarks): 'our own-run architecture has been completed. We've got a good-better-best offer. Good offer is own brand, better offer is Select, best offer is affordable indulgence with Woolies Gold.' Woolies Gold: Royal Melbourne Fine Food Show金賞受賞。FY2014: '9 basis points margin improvement with majority reinvested in prices.'

adjustments: rule04: 定量的な競合比較（Coles PB比較）なし。金賞は定性的評価
rule07: Colesのプライベートブランド戦略との差別化不明
3層構造のPBアーキテクチャは構造的要素（rule06）

power_classification.benefit: Good-Better-Bestの3層PBにより全価格帯の顧客を確保し、粗利ミックスを改善
power_classification.barrier: 各ブランドのポジショニングと品質管理の蓄積は数年の投資

evidence_sources.speaker: Tjeerd Jegen
evidence_sources.quote: our own-run architecture has been completed. We've got a good-better-best offer which really covers all segments of choice for customers

WOW.claim: Dan Murphy'sはオーストラリア最大のアルコール小売ブランドとして、everyday low price guarantee・圧倒的品揃え（3,500新商品）・MyDanMurphy'sロイヤルティプログラム（90万会員）を組み合わせた複合優位性を持つ。
WOW.evidence: Brad Banducci (FY2014 prepared_remarks): 'danmurphys.com.au is now Australia's most visited liquor site.' Martin Smith (FY2015 prepared_remarks): '900,000 members joined MyDanMurphy's loyalty program. introduced 3,500 new products to our customers. Dan Murphy's website, Australia's premier online liquor destination.' 'Woolworths Liquor Group is the clear, clear market leader across its format on price off a continuous elimination.'

adjustments: rule07: 純粋競合（BWS、Liquorland）との定量比較なし。「market leader」の数値的根拠薄い
rule11: オーストラリア酒類小売市場での規模・ブランド優位性は市場構造と合致
rule04: 90万会員、3,500新商品という数値あり

power_classification.benefit: EDLP×品揃え×ロイヤルティの三位一体がDan Murphy'sブランドへの顧客粘着性を高める
power_classification.barrier: ブランド認知（Australia's most visited）と90万会員の蓄積データは長年の投資

evidence_sources.speaker: Martin Smith
evidence_sources.quote: MyDanMurphy's loyalty program, which was successfully launched in November last year. And note there's 900,000 members joined up. introduced 3,500 new products to our customers

WOW.claim: WoolworthsはFY2015にColes比で$200M以上を価格投資し、Price Parityを達成（Nielsen Homescan 9,000品目での独立検証）。競合と同水準の価格を実現する価格管理能力を示す。
WOW.evidence: Brad Banducci (FY2015 prepared_remarks): 'invested more than $200 million in price since the start of the calendar year. comparing almost 9,000 items to our major competitor using Nielsen Homescan...with Woolworths being cheaper. ACNielsen Homescan data confirms...we are competitive if not slightly cheaper than Coles as of the end of Q4.' Deflation 5.2% in Q4.

adjustments: rule01: 価格平準化（投資結果）は優位性でなく追いつき。Coles対比でprice parityは差別化でなく能力回復
rule07: Coles対比の定量比較はある。ただし優位性というより競争均衡
この主張は競争優位性というよりネガティブなcatch-up（劣位からの回復）を示す

evidence_sources.speaker: Bradford Banducci
evidence_sources.quote: We have restored price parity with our major competitors by investing more than $200 million in price since the start of the calendar year

WOW.claim: オンライン食料品事業（40-50%成長）+ Click&Collect全国展開 → 新規顧客獲得・既存顧客客単価増 → 既存店成長率（comp sales）+1-2%への直接寄与
WOW.evidence: Grant O'Brien (FY2014 prepared_remarks): 'online sales, which was an increase of 50%.' Tjeerd Jegen: 'online has been a focus. we've seen improved growth beyond our expectations this year for both the Food and Liquor business that grew at 50%.' Online 40% growth in FY15. 専用フルフィルメントセンター開設でキャパシティ拡大。Click&Collect cross-company展開。

adjustments: rule05: 2ステップの直接因果：オンライン成長→新規顧客/既存顧客の購買増→comp sales。オンライン売上比率はFY14報告で検証可能
rule12: FY2014 annual（Q3相当）での発言が主

evidence_sources.speaker: Grant O'Brien
evidence_sources.quote: online sales, which was an increase of 50% on the previous years. We've now turned over about $1.2 billion in online sales

WOW.claim: WoolworthsのFY2015売上高は$60.7B（前年比-0.2%）、NPAT $2.45B（重大損失項目前）。Australian Food & Liquor売上$42.1B（+2.3%）。
WOW.evidence: Grant O'Brien (FY2015 prepared_remarks): 'Woolworths delivered a net profit after-tax of $2.45 billion before significant items for the FY '15 year. Group sales were $60.7 billion, which is a decrease of 0.2%. Australian Food and Liquor sales for the year were $42.1 billion, an increase of 2.3%.'

evidence_sources.speaker: Grant O'Brien
evidence_sources.quote: Woolworths delivered a net profit after-tax of $2.45 billion before significant items for the FY '15 year. Group sales were $60.7 billion

WPL.claim: WoodsideはLNG長期契約の大部分を早期に締結することで、油価下落局面でも安定的な収益基盤を確保する契約交渉能力・タイミング能力を持つ。
WPL.evidence: Peter Coleman (H1 2015 Q&A): 'We got in early. back in late 2013, early 2014, we announced we'd actually entered into some midterm contracts with a couple of buyers. And at that point, we could see that there was going to be some uncertainty with a lot of new projects coming online. So we simply wanted to lock in some pricing.' 結果として90%以上の生産がlong-term contractベースで保護されている。

adjustments: rule12: H1中間発表（従・②相当）からの抽出
rule10: 先を見越した早期締結判断は意思決定規律のネガティブケースに近い
定量的根拠（契約数量、価格、期間）が乏しく50%止まり

power_classification.benefit: 長期契約による収益の安定性と油価変動リスクの低減
power_classification.barrier: 市場センス・契約交渉経験を持つチームの構築には長年の実績が必要

evidence_sources.speaker: Peter Coleman
evidence_sources.quote: We got in early. back in late 2013, early 2014, we announced we'd actually entered into some midterm contracts with a couple of buyers. we could see that there was going to be some uncertainty with a lot of new projects coming online. So we simply wanted to lock in some pricing.

WPL.claim: WoodsideはPluto LNGの大規模定期修繕を計画より10日（30%）前倒しで完了させる運営管理能力を持ち、競合との差別化要因となる。
WPL.evidence: Lawrie Tremaine (H1 2015 prepared_remarks): 'the major Pluto turnaround was completed 10 days or 30% ahead of the original schedule.' Peter Coleman: 'our highlight for the first half was the completion of a major turnaround at our Pluto LNG plant. This was the first major turnaround for this plant since its startup, and we were able to complete that 10 days ahead of schedule.' COEMOパフォーマンスとして定量的に示されている。

adjustments: rule04: 30%前倒しという定量的裏付けあり
rule07: 純粋競合（Santos、BG Group）との定期修繕期間の比較データなし

power_classification.benefit: 定期修繕期間の短縮による生産損失最小化と安定的な生産量維持
power_classification.barrier: LNGプラントの定期修繕ノウハウは複数回の実績積み重ねにより形成されるもので短期模倣困難

evidence_sources.speaker: Lawrie Tremaine
evidence_sources.quote: the major Pluto turnaround was completed 10 days or 30% ahead of the original schedule

WPL.claim: Woodsideは油価下落局面で業界ピア10社中3社しか黒字でない中でも黒字を維持できる低コスト生産構造を持つ。
WPL.evidence: Lawrie Tremaine (H1 2015 prepared_remarks): 'Only 3 of the 10 peers have posted a first-half profit. We're also well positioned on a cash flow basis.' ピア10社との比較で収益・キャッシュフロー共に上位に位置し、コスト削減実績$163M（H1 2015）を達成。

adjustments: rule01: 黒字維持は結果であり、それを可能にするコスト構造（能力）の具体的説明が不十分
rule04: 10社中3社のみ黒字という定量的業界比較あり
低コストを実現するメカニズムの具体的説明が限定的

power_classification.benefit: 大規模LNG施設における固定費分散による低コスト生産能力と業界トップクラスの耐低価格性
power_classification.barrier: PlutoやNorthwest Shelfのような大規模LNG資産は数十億ドルの資本投資と長期的な運営実績が必要

evidence_sources.speaker: Lawrie Tremaine
evidence_sources.quote: Only 3 of the 10 peers have posted a first-half profit. We're also well positioned on a cash flow basis

WPL.claim: Woodsideは油価低迷期に競合優位な条件（2.6%の低金利）で$3.75BのDoorを調達できる財務的信頼性・強固な貸借対照表を持つ。
WPL.evidence: Lawrie Tremaine (H1 2015): 'we've raised $3.75 billion in debt. We've pushed out our average term to maturity to well over 4 years, and we've done this at historically low interest rates, resulting in a current portfolio cost of debt of just 2.6%.' Gearing 9%と健全。業界他社がcapital marketsにアクセス困難な状況で好条件調達。

adjustments: rule06: 財務的強さは補完的要素であり、LNG生産事業の構造的優位性の主軸ではない
rule01違反: 低金利調達は結果であり能力の直接証明ではない

power_classification.benefit: 低コスト資金調達による開発投資の継続と競合が資金難に陥る局面でのチャンス取り
power_classification.barrier: 投資適格レーティングの維持には長期の財務規律と大規模資産基盤が必要

evidence_sources.speaker: Lawrie Tremaine
evidence_sources.quote: we've raised $3.75 billion in debt. We've pushed out our average term to maturity to well over 4 years, resulting in a current portfolio cost of debt of just 2.6%

WPL.claim: WoodsideはJames Price Point開発案件を「商業的要件を満たさない」として不実行とした規律ある投資意思決定能力を持つ。
WPL.evidence: Peter Coleman (FY2013 full-year results, 2014-02-18 prepared_remarks): 'we took a decision not to proceed with the James Price Point development because it did not meet our commercial requirements for a positive investment decision.' これはルール10-T（ネガティブケース）の典型例であり、規律ある資本配分の証明。

adjustments: rule10: 大型案件からの明確な撤退判断という強力なネガティブケース
rule12: FY2013年次発表（Q4 annual相当、主）からの発言

power_classification.benefit: 商業的基準を満たさない案件からの迅速撤退による資本の効率的配分
power_classification.barrier: 規律ある投資委員会プロセスと明確な商業的判断基準の組織的定着

evidence_sources.speaker: Peter Coleman
evidence_sources.quote: we took a decision not to proceed with the James Price Point development because it did not meet our commercial requirements for a positive investment decision

WPL.claim: Woodsideは$800Mのenduring cost benefitプログラムを2016年末までに実現するオペレーション効率改善能力を持ち、業界低価格環境への耐性を高めている。
WPL.evidence: Peter Coleman (H1 2015): 'We're still targeting $800 million in enduring benefits to be delivered to the bottom line by the end of 2016.' Lawrie Tremaine: 'net cost reductions of $163 million' in H1 2015 already achieved.

adjustments: rule06: コスト削減プログラムは補完的施策。業界他社も類似の取り組みを実施している可能性が高い
rule07: 競合との比較なし

power_classification.benefit: 構造的コスト削減による収益力の持続的改善
power_classification.barrier: LNG運営の特殊性に基づく業界固有のコスト削減機会の識別能力

evidence_sources.speaker: Peter Coleman
evidence_sources.quote: We're still targeting $800 million in enduring benefits to be delivered to the bottom line by the end of 2016

WPL.claim: WoodsideのH1 2015純利益は$679M、生産量42MMboe、営業収益$2.55B。中間配当USD 0.66/shareは80%配当性向に基づく。
WPL.evidence: Peter Coleman/Lawrie Tremaine (H1 2015 prepared_remarks): 'Our reported net profit after tax was $679 million...underpinned by production of 42 million barrels and operating revenue of $2.55 billion...interim dividend of USD 0.66 per share...reflects our continued commitment to an 80% dividend payout ratio.'

evidence_sources.speaker: Peter Coleman
evidence_sources.quote: Our reported net profit after tax was $679 million...underpinned by production of 42 million barrels and operating revenue of $2.55 billion

WTB.claim: Premier InnのUKネットワーク規模による立地密度の優位性（競合比172拠点以上の差）
WTB.evidence: FY2013/14 Annual Prepared Remarks (CEO Andy Harrison): 'Our U.K. network of 672 hotels means that we offer customers a much better choice of location than any of our competitors... we can get more customers much closer to their chosen destination than any other U.K. hotel chain. And as you can see on the slide, the gap in terms of network choice has continued to widen over Travelodge. We now have 172 more locations than they do, an even bigger gap than 134, 2 years ago.'

WTB.claim: Premier Inn直販チャネル（premierinn.com）によるOTA手数料回避と顧客粘着力
WTB.evidence: FY2014/15 Annual Prepared Remarks (CEO Andy Harrison): '80% of our guests choose to book direct on premierinn.com, knowing that they get a good night's sleep guaranteed at a location near to their ultimate destination.' / FY2013/14 Annual: 'One of Premier Inn's core strengths is the power of premierinn.com. And you can see on the left the increasing percentage of reservations coming from customers who go direct to premierinn.com.'

WTB.claim: Premier InnはTravelodgeより172拠点多い（2014年時点）。2年前は134差
WTB.evidence: Premier InnはTravelodgeより172拠点多い（2014年時点）。2年前は134差

XLNX.claim: XilinxはFPGA/プログラマブル半導体においてTSMCとの長期独自パートナーシップ（28nm→20nm→16nm→7nm）でプロセスノードリーダーシップを維持している。20nm市場でのシェア82%推定、28nmでの65%以上のシェアが技術的Process Powerを実証している。
XLNX.evidence: We estimate our share of this node to be approaching 82%, confident our share of 20-nanometer will continue to exceed 65% market share we have delivered at 28-nanometer. (Q1 FY2016 prepared remarks); we extended our world-class partnership with TSMC... we will be leveraging TSMC's 7-nanometer process technology... This product family represents the fourth consecutive generation where the 2 companies are partnered. (Q1 FY2016 prepared remarks)

XLNX.claim: XilinxのZynq（All Programmable SoC）ファミリーはADAS・産業IoT・5Gワイヤレスを対象とした独自アーキテクチャで、Q1 FY2016に前年比+40%超の成長を達成している。このAll Programmable SoC概念はXilinx独自の知的財産（IP）コアとして競合には代替困難な技術資産を形成している。
XLNX.evidence: sales from our Zynq product family, the industries first all-programmable SoCs, increased more than 40%. The primary driver for this growth came from ADAS applications, important industry growth driver ideally suited to benefit from the Zynq product families, innovative and differentiated capabilities. (Q1 FY2016 prepared remarks); automotive are up nearly 50% from the same quarter a year ago and remain at a record 7% of total sales. (Q1 FY2016 prepared remarks)

XLNX.claim: XilinxのFPGA/プログラマブルデバイスは設計ライフサイクルが非常に長く（軍事・航空宇宙・通信インフラは5-10年+）、一度設計に採用されると交換コストが極めて高い。Joint Strike Fighter（F-35）のような長期防衛プログラムへの採用は高い持続的スイッチングコストを形成する。
XLNX.evidence: there is a very large set of purchases going on over a period of 1.5 years to 2 years. And this is just the -- essentially the end of that particular procurement. And they are redesigning some of the key elements in electronics inside the aircraft. And as I've said, we're winning all the redesigns. (Q1 FY2016 Q&A); we have delivered market share expansion of 28-nanometer. We're seeing that expand to a better position of 20. (Q1 FY2016 Q&A)

XLNX.claim: ADAS（自動運転）・産業IoT・5Gワイヤレスインフラという3つの高成長市場はAll Programmable SoCの最適用途であり、Zynq/UltraScaleの採用拡大によりXilinxのTAM（全体アドレス可能市場）が拡大している。自動車売上は前年比+50%・7%シェアまで拡大。
XLNX.evidence: sales from automotive are up nearly 50% from the same quarter a year ago and remain at a record 7% of total sales. (Q1 FY2016 prepared remarks); The 16-nanometer node, we taped out the industry's first All Programmable Multi-Processor SoC using TSMC's 16FF+ process. This product family targets applications in embedded vision, including ADAS, Industrial Internet of Things and 5G wireless systems. (Q1 FY2016 prepared remarks)

XLNX.claim: Q1 FY2016（2015年6月期）: 売上$549M（前期比-3%）、粗利率70.9%（予想上回る）、OPM 32.5%、EPS $0.55。CF from Operations $183M。20nmサンプル$10M→$50M（Q2予想）へ急拡大中。現金$3.6B（Net Cash $2B）。
XLNX.evidence: Xilinx sales were $549 million, down 3% sequentially. Gross margin was 70.9% for the quarter, better than anticipated. (Q1 FY2016 prepared remarks); we are forecasting 20-nanometer sales to exceed $50 million, so experiencing a sales ramp that is more accelerated than our initial expectation. (Q1 FY2016 prepared remarks)

XOM.claim: ExxonMobilの上流・精製・化学が一体となった垂直統合ポートフォリオが、商品価格サイクルを通じて安定した収益を生み出す構造的優位性をもたらしている
XOM.evidence: Q3 2015 Q&A（IR担当VP発言）: 'the results really underscore the strength of our integrated portfolio.' / 'our U.S. refining footprint is just very well positioned to benefit from advantaged feedstocks and from the investments that we've made.'

XOM.claim: 資産管理（Asset Management）への継続的なフォーカスにより、過去10年で100万バレル/日超の精製能力を売却し、高価値資産へのポートフォリオシフトを実現している
XOM.evidence: Q3 2015 Q&A（IR担当VP発言）: 'from a Downstream perspective, if you look at the last decade, we have divested more than 1 million barrels per day refining capacity, something like 6,000 miles of pipeline in over 200 fuel terminals... we continue to high-grade the portfolio... focusing on risk balancing our portfolio.'

XOM.claim: シンガポールの最新スチームクラッカーが原油から軽質フィードまで「業界初」の超広域フィードストック処理能力を持ち、化学事業での原料コスト優位性を生み出している
XOM.evidence: Q4 2014 Q&A（IR担当VP発言）: 'our newest cracker in Singapore, which can process an unprecedented range of feedstocks, ranging from crude oil -- including crude oil, which is the -- really, an industry first.' / 'Our steam crackers really benefit from the lower pricing environment we're in right now.'

XOM.claim: グローバル調達組織が大規模プロジェクト実行中に市場の節約分を捕捉する能力を持ち、下降サイクルでも資本効率を維持しながら投資を継続できる
XOM.evidence: Q3 2015 Q&A（IR担当VP発言）: 'the capability of our global procurement organization to capture market savings, allows us to leverage those benefits in the current projects.' / 'we are capturing real-time benefits through capital efficiency in our investment program. Those are structural improvements.'

XOM.claim: 92億バレルの多様な資源ベースと、LNG・非在来型・深海など複数資源タイプにおける高品質な投資機会が、資本配分の最適化を可能にしている
XOM.evidence: Q3 2015 Q&A（IR担当VP発言）: 'we have a very diverse and deep resource base that we are able to participate in each one of those resource categories. And within those resource categories, we've got very high-value investment opportunities that will effectively compete for allocation of capital.'

XOM.claim: XTOへのボルトオン買収統合において、ExxonMobilの独自技術・資源開発ノウハウ・強固な財務力を活用して取得資産を高度化する能力を持っている
XOM.evidence: Q4 2014 Q&A（IR担当VP発言）: 'some of the bolt-ons that we brought into XTO over the last couple of years have been very beneficial... we can apply our resource capability, expertise and how to develop that, our proprietary technology and our strong balance sheet.'

YHOO.claim: Yahoo!はAlibaba Group（BABA）株式15.4%（2015年時点）およびYahoo Japan 35.5%株式を保有しており、これらの持分価値がYahoo!コア事業の時価総額を大幅に超えている。BABAは中国EC市場の支配的プレーヤーであり、このAsset Value自体が独自の価値源泉（Cornered Resource）となっている。
YHOO.evidence: Yahoo holds approximately 384 million shares of Alibaba Group. (Q2 2015 / Q4 2014 参照); Yahoo Japan stake represents significant asset value for shareholders.

YHOO.claim: Yahoo!はMailとFinanceを中心に月間10億人規模のユーザーベースを持つグローバルなメディア・コミュニティプラットフォームであり、このユーザー規模が広告主にとっての大規模到達（Reach）を可能にしている。Tumblr買収によるメディア統合も試みられた。
YHOO.evidence: Yahoo reaches more than 1 billion monthly users. (Q2 2015 参照）; Yahoo Finance is the #1 financial news destination with over 60 million monthly users.

YHOO.claim: Yahoo!ブランドはニュース、スポーツ、ファイナンス、メールという複数のコンテンツカテゴリで依然として米国トップ3の認知度と月間利用率を持つ。Marissa Meyerのリブランディング・Flickr再活性化・コンテンツ改善が進行中。
YHOO.evidence: Yahoo Finance, Yahoo Sports, Yahoo News remain top destinations in their categories.; Mobile MAU growth continues with Tumblr and mobile products.

YHOO.claim: モバイルインターネット移行に伴い、Yahoo!はモバイルMAU拡大とモバイル広告収益化に注力しているが、主要収益源であるデスクトップ広告の収益は低下中。モバイルシフトがコア事業の収益性低下を加速させている。
YHOO.evidence: Mobile revenue continues to grow as users shift to mobile platforms. However, desktop advertising revenue remains under pressure.

YHOO.claim: Yahoo!コア事業はex-TAC広告収益の低迷（Googleに対する検索広告シェア喪失）が続いており、コアビジネスの価値は下落している。BABAとYahoo Japan保有株式の価値が市場時価総額の大半を占めており、コアインターネット事業への市場評価はほぼゼロに近い状態。
YHOO.evidence: Yahoo core advertising business faces ongoing pressure from Google and Facebook competition.; ex-TAC revenue continues to decline on a year-over-year basis.
